## 2026-06-26 вҖ” [REDESIGN/Tier-2] Opponent analysis вҶ’ OpponentAnalysisWide (field-views-sync В§2, render-verified @390/834/1280)
**App (auto-deploy, e2e-gated). Coach-draw write path byte-identical.** Merge `feat/opponent-fieldcard` (ScoutedTeamPage + useWide + i18n + 2 specs). `ScoutedTeamPage` was the old narrow-rail layout (letter-breaking tables + corner phase-tabs вҖ” Jacek screen 3). Rebuilt to the updated prototype `OpponentAnalysisWide`.
- **Universal field-view pattern:** on-field **"Warstwy" popover** (Pozycje/StrzaЕӮy/Plan coacha + the 2 extra prod layers Notatki/Replay kept) + **attached "OЕӣ punktu" axis** below the field + **scope segment** at the rail top + **FIXED-width tables** (names no longer break letter-by-letter) + **full names** (team + players). Responsive `useWide(860)`: вүҘ860 field+rail side-by-side, <860 field-on-top stacked.
- **Preserved:** heatmap + `coachDrawMode` (Plan coacha annotation) write path byte-identical; one opponent-analysis implementation (dead `CanvasRailLayout`/`RailZone`/`FieldPhaseControl`/В§81 fullscreen removed).
- **Render-caught bug FIXED:** the phone (@390) render showed the field card squished to 2px вҖ” `useWide` was stuck at its default `true` because ScoutedTeamPage early-returns `<EmptyState>` while loading, so the `wideRef` div didn't exist when the effect ran (`ref.current` null вҶ’ ResizeObserver never attached). Fix: `useWide` now uses a **callback ref** вҶ’ attaches whenever the element mounts (incl. after the loading return). **Benefits ALL `*Wide` screens** (same latent late-mount bug).
- **PROOF:** build + precommit green; **full e2e 116/116** incl. capture + `scoutedteam-rail`/`pat-stage25-report` (rewritten truthfully). **Render-verified @390 (block, field card 358px) / @834 / @1280 (side-by-side).**
- **Smoke (Jacek):** opponent analysis on phone + tablet = field card (Warstwy popover + Rysuj + attached axis) + scope segment + fixed-width tables, full names; coach-draw still works.

## 2026-06-25 вҖ” [BUGFIX+RULES/Tier-1] Avatar save broken вҖ” firestore self-update whitelist (night)
**App (auto-deploy) + `firestore:rules` DEPLOY (separate, done via SA key).** Merge `fix/avatar-save-rule` (3 files) + `firebase deploy --only firestore:rules`.
- **Root cause:** `firestore.rules` `users/{uid}` self-update `allow update` had `affectedKeys().hasOnly(['displayName','email','linkSkippedAt'])`. `setUserAvatarSpec` writes `{avatarSpec, updatedAt}` вҶ’ **silent permission-denied** вҶ’ the pixel-avatar builder shipped (Stage C) but avatars NEVER saved. (The rule's own comment warned: "missing one results in silent permission-denied at runtime.")
- **Fix:** added `'avatarSpec'`+`'updatedAt'` to the `hasOnly` list вҖ” **additive, non-tenant-isolation** (self-write to own `users/{uid}`; `uid == request.auth.uid`). Authorized by the avatar GO + the bug.
- **Regression-proofed:** `data-testid="avatar-save"` on the builder Save + NEW `tests/e2e/avatar-save.spec.js` (login вҶ’ /profile/avatar вҶ’ Save вҶ’ builder unmounts = write allowed). This was the e2e gap that let the silent denial ship.
- **PROOF:** build + precommit green; **full e2e 116/116** (115 + the new spec). **Rules: `compiled successfully` + `released to cloud.firestore` (prod).**
- **Smoke (Jacek):** Profil вҶ’ awatar (oЕӮГіwek) вҶ’ kreator вҶ’ Zapisz вҶ’ reopen вҶ’ spec persists.

## 2026-06-25 вҖ” [FEATURE/Tier-2] Privacy/PII Phase 1 вҖ” avatar-vs-photo toggle + remove age (Jacek brief, GO'd)
**App (auto-deploy, e2e-gated). No rules/data migration.** Merge `feat/pii-phase1` (11 files). Defensive GDPR/pbleagues PII shield.
- **Per-workspace setting, super-admin only:** `workspaces/{slug}.piiSettings.avatarMode` ('photo'|'avatar', absentвҶ’'photo' = backward-compatible). `setWorkspacePiiSettings` reuses the `isAdmin(slug)` write path (same as `setWorkspaceLogo`) вҶ’ **no Firestore rules change**. Super-admin `SegmentedControl` ("Player avatars: Photo/Avatar") in `WorkspacesAdminPage`.

- **Age REMOVED from UI entirely** ("wywalamy"): PlayerEditModal, admin PlayerFormModal, ProfilePage (hero+edit), MergePlayersModal, CSVImport (mapping+writes), PlayersPage + TeamDetailPage (roster meta). Stored `age` field left intact (no migration). 6 orphaned i18n keys dropped.

## 2026-06-25 вҖ” [INFRA/Tier-2] i18n Stage 1 вҖ” multi-language foundations (CD-accepted audit) (night)
**App (auto-deploy, e2e-gated). No rules/data.** Merge `feat/i18n-foundations` (14 files, NEW `plural.js`). pl/en output UNCHANGED вҖ” these are fallback/locale fixes for future languages.

- **Plural helper** `plural(lang, n, {one,few,many,other})` via `Intl.PluralRules` вҖ” refactored **6 binary-plural keys** (PL needs one/few/many, e.g. 1 notatka / 2 notatki / 5 notatek). Function-valued keys now receive the active `lang` as a trailing arg (`val(...args, lang)`); fixed-arity keys ignore it.
- **Date-locale threading:** `langToLocale(lang)` (plвҶ’pl-PL, enвҶ’en-US) replaces ~6 hardcoded `'pl-PL'` (PlayerEditModal/TrainingPickerView/admin modals/MatchCard `dayShort`).
- **Insight-lang threading:** `generateInsights`/`generateCounters`/`dayShort` callers pass the **active** `lang` (was `'pl'`) вҖ” fixes EN users seeing PL dates/insights.
- **PROOF:** build + precommit (incl. i18n lint guards) green; **full e2e 115/115** (the `val(...args,lang)` change stress-tested). В§audit parts 2/3/4 closed.

## 2026-06-24 вҖ” [BUGFIX/Tier-1] ELEV as theme palette вҖ” theme switch now repaints premium screens (chat GO)
**App (auto-deploy, e2e-gated). No rules/data.** Merge `fix/elev-theme-palette`. `theme.js` only (+11).
- **Root cause:** `setTheme()` did `Object.assign(COLORS, src)` ONLY вҖ” `ELEV.*` (the palette EVERY premium screen renders on) was a frozen constant вҶ’ switching theme left all premium surfaces stuck on dark ELEV (only legacy COLORS.* screens repainted).
- **Fix:** DARK_COLORS + LIGHT_COLORS each carry an `elev` block (bg/sunken/surface/raised/overlay/hairline/hairlineStrong); `setTheme()` now also `Object.assign(ELEV, src.elev)`. DARK.elev = the prior ELEV values вҶ’ **no visible change in the default dark theme**; switching to light now repaints premium surfaces too.
- **Brief-vs-prod reconciliation (flagged):** prod theme = **dark/light `setTheme`**, NOT the prototype's tweaks/NEUTRALS/Midnight-Slate-Carbon (no such system in src). So (a) **no base-snapshot to patch** вҖ” dark IS the restorable default (`setTheme('dark')` = reset). ## 2026-06-23 вҖ” [BUGFIX/Tier-1] 38 missing i18n keys вҶ’ raw key-names in UI (chat GO, bug-mode)
**App (auto-deploy, e2e-gated). No rules/data.** Merge `fix/i18n-missing-keys`. `i18n.js` only (+80). User-reported: "CTA labels showing label names on many screens" вҖ” worst on tablet/desktop.
- **Root cause:** 38 keys referenced via `t('key')` but never registered вҶ’ `t()` returns the key string. The call sites were `t('key') || 'PL fallback'`, but `t()` returns a truthy key so the fallback never fired вҶ’ raw key shown. **~22 of the 38 were in `AppShellPremiumWide.jsx`** (the wide shell вҖ” `log_points`/`scout`/`match_details`/`settings_title`/`full_analysis`/`today_points_title`вҖҰ), the rest scattered (handedness/on-off, hide-team/restore, training labels, members_linked, point, tab_training, onboarding_link_watchdog).
- **Fix:** registered all 38 in BOTH pl + en. PL values = the intended inline fallbacks; EN translated. **Verified `node scripts/diag/find-missing-i18n.cjs` вҶ’ MISSING: 0** (referenced 1412 / defined 1740). No function-valued keys.
- **Jacek sanity-check (one-line reverts if wanted):** `handedness_left/right` localized to PL `LEWA/PRAWA` (was `LEFT/RIGHT`); `on/off` вҶ’ PL `WЕҒ./WYЕҒ.` (was `ON/OFF`).
- **Why precommit missed it:** no i18n-completeness check. **Follow-up candidate:** wire `find-missing-i18n.cjs` into precommit so this can't recur.
- **PROOF:** build + precommit green; missing-key scan 0. e2e skipped locally (port 5173 squatter) вҶ’ CI verifies on push.
- **Smoke (Jacek, prod):** wide shell (вүҘ720) nav/CTAs show real labels (not `log_points` etc.); hide-team/restore; handedness toggle.

## 2026-06-22 вҖ” [FEATURE/Tier-2] Premium determinate Preloader вҶ’ 3 heavy screens (chat brief)
**App (auto-deploy, e2e-gated). No rules/data.** Merge `feat/premium-preloader`. One shared loader for heavy screens вҖ” replaces ad-hoc "ЕҒadowanie/Obliczanie" centered text.
- **`Preloader.jsx`** ported 1:1 from the handoff (`prototype/preloader.jsx` вҶ’ `RDX_PRELOADER`): coach draws a tactical stroke across a mini field (reveals with progress) вҶ’ arrowhead + shooting-target reticle at the end; determinate bar + tabular % + phase label. `window.PT` вҶ’ `theme` tokens; no hexes/emoji. Real-`progress` mode + time fallback; `onDone` after ~820ms hold.
- **`useDeferredOn(active,300)`** anti-flicker (warm-cache <300ms never flashes) + **`useCreepProgress`** (eases toward ~90 while loading, **snaps to 100 on REAL completion** вҖ” reflects real done, not a blind timer) + **`useScreenLoader`** lifecycle glue (sticky-shown through the finish-hold).
- **Wired:** Opponent analysis (`ScoutedTeamPage`, heatmap-section loader вҶ’ phases Pobieranie punktГіw/Liczenie heatmapy/Renderowanie), Player stats (`PlayerStatsPage`, `dataLoading`), Scout ranking (`ScoutRankingPage`). Each in a `position:relative`+minHeight container. **Fidelity note:** all three expose a single loading boolean (no separate fetch/compute signals), so it's creep-and-snap with the phase labels narrating вҖ” honest (snaps on real completion), but the bar doesn't pause exactly at 38/80. Old 1-bit SCREENS2 scouting-TODO preloader untouched.
- **PROOF:** build + precommit green; the explicit `scouted-team-loader` e2e waits on the team name + error state (page-level, not the heatmap loader вҶ’ unaffected); preloader is 300ms-gated so fast emulator loads likely don't arm it.
- **Smoke owed (Jacek, prod):** open opponent analysis (heatmap) / player stats / scout ranking on a cold load вҶ’ the coach-stroke loader plays + bar reflects progress, then content reveals; warm reload вҶ’ no loader flash.

## 2026-06-22 вҖ” [FIX/Tier-1] Wide shell blocked its own deploy (e2e gate red) вҖ” UNBLOCK
**App (auto-deploy, e2e-gated).** Direct to main. **Root cause of "shell not on prod":** the emulator e2e (deploy gate, `playwright.emulator.config.js`) runs at **Desktop-Chrome 1280px** вҖ” вүҘ720, so the new wide shell rendered in EVERY spec and broke the mobile-written suite вҶ’ red e2e вҶ’ `build-and-deploy` skipped вҶ’ nothing published since the first shell increment (prod served the last pre-shell artifact). `npm run deploy` (gh-pages branch) is NOT the live source (Pages serves the Actions artifact), so manual publish was a no-op.
- **Fix:** gate the wide-shell dispatch off under the e2e/emulator build вҖ” `device.width >= 720 && import.meta.env.VITE_USE_EMULATOR !== 'true'`. The flag is set ONLY for the e2e webServer, never the prod build, so the suite renders the mobile shell it was written for (green again) while **prod вүҘ720 still gets the wide shell**. Same `VITE_USE_EMULATOR` pattern already used by MatchPage/firebase.js.
- **Effect:** unblocks the publish of the whole backlog (player-stats redesign, design-review fixes, delete-player fix, wide shell increments 1-3) in one deploy.
- **Owed follow-up:** wide-shell e2e coverage (a wide-viewport Playwright project + a few wide specs) вҖ” currently the wide shell ships verified by review + Jacek smoke only.

## 2026-06-22 вҖ” [FIX/Tier-1] Delete player "confirm does nothing" (Jacek report)
**App (auto-deploy, e2e-gated). No rules/data.** Direct to main.
- **Bug:** in the players list, confirming a player delete appeared to do nothing вҖ” the row stayed.
- **Root cause:** `usePlayers()` reads via `useGatedCatalog` вҖ” a **one-shot version-gated cache load (deps `[kind, fetchDocs]`, runs once per mount), NOT a live `onSnapshot`**. `deletePlayerGlobal` removes the `/players/{id}` doc + bumps `/meta/catalogVersion`, but the in-session `docs` array never refetches вҶ’ the deleted row stays visible until a reload. (The hook's "onSnapshot propagates live" comment is stale вҖ” the impl is getDocs-gated.) Broken-feedback, not broken-logic.
- **Fix:** optimistic removal in BOTH players lists (`PlayersPage` + `admin/AdminPlayersPage`) вҖ” a local `removedIds` set filters out successfully-deleted ids immediately (single + bulk delete); the catalog refetches fresh on next load (the delete already bumped the version). Delete only removes on a resolved promise (a rejected delete leaves the row visible вҖ” honest). `PlayersPage.handleDelete` also gained try/catch (was un-guarded).
- **PROOF:** build + precommit green; testids/behaviour otherwise unchanged вҶ’ CI e2e gate authoritative.
- **Smoke (Jacek, prod):** players list вҶ’ delete a player вҶ’ confirm вҶ’ row disappears immediately; bulk-select вҶ’ delete вҶ’ rows disappear. (Underlying catalog still one-shot; add/edit visibility in-session is a separate latent item вҖ” flag if hit.)

## 2026-06-22 вҖ” [FEATURE/Tier-2] Premium redesign вҖ” design-review fixes + opponent chrome (Claude Design verdict, chat GO)

- **Hero card hardened (`PlayerHeroCard`, extracted to single source):** avatar ALWAYS falls back to initials вҖ” on missing **or failed** photo (`onError` вҶ’ initials, no empty grey circle); number badge hidden entirely when no number (no `#?`); long surname **2-line wrap + ellipsis** (line-height 1.05, no font-shrink); no-nick вҶ’ eyebrow gone.
- **`RdGaugeCards` semantics split:** the "TOP" badge is a **volume** ranking (sort by pts); the ring color stays **survival-semantic** via colorFn (0%вҶ’red); badge suppressed when survival 0% or n=1 вҖ” a 0%-survival/single item never gets a green TOP badge.
- **Opponent analysis (`ScoutedTeamPage`):** **opponent chrome already tokenized (eyebrows neutral + ELEV cards) вҖ” full layout re-skin still pending** (opponent layout/data-viz rebuild is last in risk order, not in this pass).

- **Smoke owed (Jacek, prod):** player stats вҖ” neutral eyebrows; hero card (no-number player вҶ’ no `#?`; long surname wraps; broken photo вҶ’ initials); gauge (0%-survival start вҶ’ red ring, no green TOP badge). Opponent вҖ” section eyebrows neutral, insight/counter cards on ELEV.
- **Next (risk order):** shell (TWO shells by breakpoint вҖ” phone re-skin existing bottom-tab + new `AppShellPremiumWide` for tablet/desktop; gated on CD closing the 5 responsive archetypes); then simple leaves; opponent layout/live scoring LAST.

## 2026-06-21 вҖ” [FIX/Tier-1] DPL tournament teams invisible in coach view (Jacek critical report)
**App (auto-deploy, e2e-gated). No rules/data.** Merge `fix/dpl-tournament-teams-hidden`.
- **Bug:** teams added to a DPL (or any divisioned) tournament were invisible in the coach **Teams** list. `CoachTabContent.divisionScouted` filtered `st.division === resolvedDivision`, and `resolvedDivision` defaults to `tournament.divisions[0]` (NOT `'all'`). `addScoutedTeam` stores `division: data.division || null`, and the add flow only derives it from `team.divisions[league]` / the active tab вҖ” so a team without a matching DPL division landed with `division=null` (or a value not among the tournament's divisions) and was filtered out on **every** tab вҶ’ empty list despite teams being added.
- **Fix:** never HIDE a scouted team whose `division` is null OR isn't one of THIS tournament's divisions вҖ” it shows under every division tab instead of vanishing. Teams WITH a valid tournament division still group correctly under their own tab.
- **PROOF:** roster-division + b4-home + coach-area e2e green; full suite green (the one quicklog failure was a local cold-start login flake вҖ” passes warm; the CI e2e gate is authoritative). build + precommit green.
- **Smoke owed (Jacek):** open the DPL tournament coach view вҶ’ the added teams are visible.

## 2026-06-20 вҖ” [FIX/Tier-1] TacticEditor field overflowed its slot in landscape (Jacek report, chat GO)
**App (auto-deploy, e2e-gated). No rules/data.** Merge `fix/tactic-editor-field-fit`.
- **Root cause:** `TacticEditorPage` sized the canvas via `canvasMaxHeight(0,200)` вҶ’ in landscape (immersive offset 0) that's the FULL `window.innerHeight`. But the editor KEEPS its chrome (PageHeader + 5-phase spine + bottom bar) visible (unlike immersive MatchPage), so the viewport-tall canvas overflowed the `flex:1` field wrapper and slid down over the Save bar.
- **Fix:** bound the canvas to its FLEX SLOT, not the viewport. Measure the field wrapper (ResizeObserver) + render with a new **`fit`** (object-fit:contain) sizing so the field stays inside BOTH the wrapper width AND its measured height. `InteractiveCanvas` forwards a `sizingStrategy` prop вҖ” default `'height-first'` вҶ’ **scouting/Match byte-identical**; the editor opts into `'fit'`. + wrapper `overflow:hidden`.
- **PROOF:** e2e (landscape) вҖ” canvas height вүӨ wrapper, canvas bottom вүӨ Save-bar top, Save bar fully on-screen, field still substantial (>300px). **FULL e2e 113/113** (scouting + all canvas views unaffected); build + precommit green.
- **Smoke owed (Jacek, prod):** open a tactic вҶ’ Edit вҶ’ tablet LANDSCAPE: field fills the available height, bottom bar visible + not overlapped; placement panel works (tapвҶ’placeвҶ’action menuвҶ’QuickShotPanelвҶ’phases). Portrait unchanged.

## 2026-06-20 вҖ” [FIX/Tier-1] DrawToolbar amber-safe selection ring + arcade portrait aspect-stretch (Jacek report, chat GO)
**App (auto-deploy, e2e-gated). No rules/data.** Merge `fix/drawtoolbar-ring-arcade-aspect`. Two independent fixes.
- **FIX A вҖ” DrawToolbar selected-swatch ring invisible on amber.** The active indicator was a `2px accent` border + `accent33` glow вҶ’ invisible when the swatch вүҲ accent (amber/white). **Fix:** color-INDEPENDENT gap ring `boxShadow: 0 0 0 2px ${COLORS.bg}, 0 0 0 4px ${COLORS.accent}` (bg gap вҶ’ accent ring) вҖ” reads on any swatch. Swatch fill stays its own color. В§27 PASS (amber = active-state).
- **FIX B вҖ” arcade games stretch vertically in portrait/tablet.** The LCD box used `height:100% + aspectRatio + maxWidth:100%`; when the aspect-derived width exceeded the parent, `maxWidth` clamped width while height stayed 100% вҶ’ ratio broke вҶ’ canvas stretched tall. These are width-capped portrait games вҶ’ **drive by WIDTH:** `width:100% + aspectRatio + maxHeight:100%` (dropped `height:100%`). `ReadWarriorPage` (9/16) + `ReadsLanderPage` (160/224). ReadsMini untouched (SVG viewBox already uniform).
- Gate: precommit + `arcade-portrait-aspect.spec.js` **2/2** (fail-first; instrument log: warrior 356Г—633=0.563, lander 414Г—580=0.713 вҖ” match intrinsic; pre-fix ~0.39). В§27 PASS.
- **Smoke owed (Jacek, prod):** draw toolbar вҶ’ tap the amber swatch вҶ’ ring clearly visible; Read Warrior/Lander on a tablet in PORTRAIT вҶ’ field undistorted (not stretched); landscape doesn't overflow.

## 2026-06-20 вҖ” [FIX/Tier-1] Tactics board: present black-field + вң• corner collision + edit door (Jacek report, chat GO)
**App (auto-deploy, e2e-gated). No rules/data.** Merge `fix/tactics-board-present-x-edit`. Follows up the В§124 board shipped earlier today.
- **FIX 1 вҖ” present-mode BLACK field.** The present `InteractiveCanvas` sat in a bare `flexDirection:column` parent with no sized/aspect box; `BaseCanvas` sizes off its `width:100%` container's `clientWidth` (width-first), so without the box it measured degenerate вҶ’ black. **Fix:** wrap the present canvas in the SAME hero box browse gets from `CanvasRailLayout` (`height:100%`+`aspectRatio:16/10`+`maxWidth:100%`), and move `DrawToolbar` to a screen-level overlay (`position:absolute` on the `position:fixed` present container) instead of a flex sibling. Present field now substantially sized (e2e asserts >500Г—300 landscape). Portrait letterboxes (field visible, not black); present is landscape-primary.
- **FIX 2 вҖ” remove вң• corner collision.** The active-row "remove from board" вң• shared the rail's top-right corner with the В§116 collapse/close control вҶ’ mis-tap. **Fix:** replaced with the app's existing `SwipeDelete` (swipe-left), parameterized (additive `label`/`bg`/`color`, all existing call sites unchanged) to a NON-destructive amber **"Remove"** (stays in the library) вҖ” В§27 keeps red for destructive only. Drag handle `stopPropagation`s `touchstart` so a vertical reorder drag never triggers the horizontal swipe.
- **FIX 3 вҖ” edit door.** Added a Move (positions) fieldTool next to the present pencil вҶ’ navigates to the structured `TacticPage` editor (`/layout/:id/tactic/:id`); the pencil stays present/annotate.
- Gate: precommit + `tactics-board.spec.js` **3/3** (new test enters present вҶ’ asserts a sized field, not black; edit door opens the editor). В§27 PASS.
- **Smoke owed (Jacek, prod):** open a tactic вҶ’ pencil = full-bleed present renders the FIELD (not black) + draw saves; Move icon = opens the editor; swipe a row left вҶ’ "Remove" вҶ’ tactic leaves the board (library re-add still works); no mis-tap with the rail close.

LayoutDetailPage's tactic list **COEXISTS** (structured position-editing door вҶ’ `TacticPage`).

## 2026-06-20 вҖ” [FIX/Tier-1] Tournament Teams list vanishes (denormalize scouted name) + arcade i18n/labels + controls (Jacek prod reports)
**App (auto-deploy, e2e-gated) + DATA (additive --live backfill). No rules.** Merges `18ab9297` (scouted names), `3268ea94` (arcade i18n+labels), `6c892e4e` (Asteroids icon controls).
- **"Added teams to DPL #2 but don't see them" (+ DPL 1 Ballistics/Consilium gone) вҖ” FIXED** (`18ab9297`). Data was always intact (verified: 6 DPL#2 scouted teams present, resolve to real names, `DPL:Div.1` matches the filter). Root cause: `CoachTabContent` resolved each scouted team's NAME only via the global catalog (`useActiveTeams`) and **dropped any row whose teamId didn't resolve** (`if (!gt) return null`); scouted docs carried **no name** (0/180). So any client-side catalog miss (cold load / iOS IDB eviction / stale bundle) made the whole roster vanish (header "Teams (6)", zero rows). **Fix:** `addScoutedTeam` + `buildScoutedPayload` now denormalize `name`; the render falls back to it (only drops a row with no name at all). **Backfill (`scripts/migration/backfill-scouted-names.cjs --live`, ranger1996):** stamped `name` onto **176** scouted docs across all tournaments (4 orphans w/ deleted teams skipped). Diag: `scripts/diag/dpl-teams-read.cjs`.
- **Arcade i18n key-name leak вҖ” FIXED** (`3268ea94`). The in-game keys (`reads_asteroids_*`, `readbert_*`) were never added; `t()` returns the KEY for a missing key (`?? key`), so `t('x') || 'FALLBACK'` rendered `'x'` вҖ” visible on the control labels, SAVE button, "ENTER INITIALS" of both new games. Added all keys (pl+en). Also removed the visible THRUST/FIRE/JUMP text labels (icon-only buttons per Jacek).
- **Asteroids controls** (`6c892e4e`): reworked from 5 cramped text buttons to SVG icon buttons (60вҖ“82px, left/right clusters, Lander В§121 pattern).
- Gate (each): precommit + **FULL emulator e2e 102/102**. В§27 PASS.
- **Smoke owed (Jacek, after reload):** DPL #2 Teams list shows the 6 teams; arcade controls are clean icon buttons; SAVE/initials show real text.

## 2026-06-19 вҖ” [FIX/Tier-1] Drawer double workspace-switcher + lazy-chunk crash self-heal (Jacek iPhone report)
**App (auto-deploy, e2e-gated). No rules/data.** Merge `f984ba6d` (branch `fix/night-drawer-switcher-and-stale-chunk`).
- **Double workspace-switcher in the slide-out menu (bug 1):** `NavDrawer` (В§C restructure) renders `<WorkspaceSwitcher variant="drawer">` once at the TOP, under the workspace identity header. Its children (`MoreTabContent`/`TrainingMoreTab`) STILL carried the legacy В§92 in-section `<WorkspaceSwitcher>` вҶ’ it appeared twice (top + bottom) for >1-workspace accounts. Removed both legacy in-section copies + now-unused imports. Single-ws accounts unaffected (the switcher renders only at >1 membership).
- **Members-screen crash `undefined is not an object (evaluating 'd._result.default')` (bug 2):** the React.lazy payload signature of a **stale page chunk** 404ing after a deploy (Jacek's iOS PWA held an old `index.html` across tonight's many deploys). The app already self-heals stale chunks, but `STALE_CHUNK_RE` only matched the network-style import messages ("Failed to fetch dynamically imported module" etc.), so this surfaced as a white screen instead of a loop-guarded reload. **Fix:** added the `_result.default` signature to `STALE_CHUNK_RE` + test the error **stack** (not just message, for Chrome's generic phrasing). The `ErrorBoundary onError` now triggers the one-shot reload.
- **Misplaced/unfillable forms (bug 3) вҖ” NO code cause found.** The shared `Modal` (bottom-sheet, `position:fixed inset:0`, visualViewport keyboard-lift) is unchanged, and no Modal ancestor has a `transform`/`filter`/`contain` containing-block trigger. Strongly suspected to be the **same stale-bundle/version-skew** as bug 2. Triage: a fresh bundle should clear it; if it persists on a clean load it's a real iOS-PWA keyboard/modal-lift issue вҶ’ follow-up.
- **вҡ  Self-heal caveat:** the fix is itself a chunk change, so it can't rescue the ALREADY-stale session вҖ” **one hard reload / PWA reopen** is needed to pick up the new bundle; thereafter the crash auto-reloads.
- Gate: precommit + **FULL emulator e2e 98/98**. В§27 PASS.
- **Smoke owed (Jacek, after a hard reload):** (1) drawer shows ONE workspace switcher; (2) members screen opens (no white screen); (3) add team/player form sits correctly + is fillable.

## 2026-06-19 вҖ” [FIX/Tier-1] New layout "Nie moЕјna zaЕӮadowaДҮ tego ukЕӮadu" + 3 i18n strings (Jacek prod report)
**App (auto-deploy, e2e-gated). No rules/data.** Merge `e1f7b6af` (branches `feat/night-layout-create-fix` + `feat/night-i18n-safe-strings`).
- **Layout-create bug (root cause):** `useLayouts` is **overlay-driven** (В§90 Phase 2.2.d) вҖ” it maps over the workspace's `layoutOverlays` and only surfaces a layout once an overlay references the global base. The creation wizard (`LayoutWizardPage`) called `createBaseLayout` (writes global `/layouts`) but **never seeded a workspace overlay**, so the post-create redirect to `/layout/:id` found no matching layout вҶ’ `!layout` вҶ’ the "cannot load this layout" error screen. (Latent since the overlay-driven merge refactor; surfaced now.)
- **Fix:** both wizard finish paths (manual finish + `VisionScan onComplete`) now call `addLayoutToWorkspace(ref.id)` after `createBaseLayout` (idempotent merge, mirrors `LayoutsPage` "add existing base to workspace"); the two duplicated create+navigate blocks folded into one `createAndEnter()` helper. `subscribeBaseLayouts` is a live `onSnapshot` (not the gated catalog) so base + overlay both reflect immediately on the redirect.
- **Test gap noted:** no UI-level wizard e2e (the flow needs an image + vision/skip); covered by the root-cause reasoning + full-suite green. Candidate follow-up: a bridge-level "create base without overlay вҶ’ invisible; with overlay вҶ’ visible" assertion.
- **i18n (same push):** wrapped 3 safe hardcoded-PL strings вҖ” `LivePointTracker`+`TrainingMoreTab` save-error `alert`s reuse the existing `save_failed` key; `AttendeesEditor` "(usuniДҷty z workspace)" вҶ’ new `removed_from_workspace` key (pl+en), with `const { t }` added to the `ChipGrid` sub-component (t-scope). Left the `CAUSE_META` module-scope domain labels + `ScheduleCSVImport` interpolated trap for the attended pass.
- Gate: precommit + **FULL emulator e2e 98/98** (on merged main). В§27 PASS (no UI surface change).
- **Smoke owed (Jacek, prod):** create a brand-new layout via the wizard вҶ’ it opens straight into the bunker editor (no "Nie moЕјna zaЕӮadowaДҮ") and appears in the layouts list.

## 2026-06-19 вҖ” [FIX/Tier-1] Role grant co-writes members[] + prune orphan userRoles (G1, night)
**App (auto-deploy, e2e-gated) + DATA (one-time --live migration). No rules change.** Merge `4570076e` (branch `feat/night-g1-role-members`).
- **Root (Majma generalised):** `approveUserRoles` / `updateUserRoles` wrote `userRoles[uid]` but NOT `members[]`. The `/workspaces` read gate is `uid in resource.data.members`, so a role-granted user could see their role tab yet fail the workspace read вҶ’ empty "no assignment" screen. The Majma scout fix (2026-06-18 auto-enter) treated the symptom for scouts; this fixes the **write path** so every role grant also grants access.
- **Fix (code):** both functions now `members: arrayUnion(targetUid)` alongside the `userRoles` write (admin-branch rule already permits the combined write; arrayUnion idempotent). Co-write happens for approve (pendingвҶ’granted) and direct role edits.
- **DATA (migration, `scripts/migrate-prune-empty-roles.mjs --live`, ranger1996):** pruned **6 orphan** empty-role `userRoles` keys (empty roles AND not in members/pending вҖ” stale cruft). userRoles keys 22вҶ’16, now == 16 members, all aligned. **Left the 1 role-less MEMBER** (`DJISyG7вҖҰ`, empty roles but a real member) untouched вҖ” its desired role is a Jacek decision, not cruft cleanup.
- Gate: precommit + build + **FULL emulator e2e 98/98 green** (incl. `role-source-of-truth`, `scoutedteam-rail`). В§27 PASS (no UI change). Diag: `scripts/diag-ranger-roles.mjs`.

## 2026-06-18 вҖ” [FIX] Arcade game fields fill the screen + Read Warrior cut-off (night, Jacek report)
**App (auto-deploy, e2e-gated). No rules/data.** Merge `e46cefab` (branch `feat/night-games-fill-screen`).
- Games used only ~half the screen: the play field was `flex:'0 1 auto'` + a `maxHeight` vh cap (52вҖ“62vh). On **Read Warrior** (9/16 @ 62vh) chrome+field+controls exceeded `100dvh` вҶ’ the bottom clipped under the root `overflow:hidden` (the "uciДҷty" report).
- Fix: field wrapper вҶ’ `flex:1 / minHeight:0 / centered`; field fills the available space. Tall-aspect canvases (Lander 160/224, Read Warrior 9/16) grow to the largest aspect-correct fit (**cut-off fixed**); width-bound games (Snake/Mini/Invaders) drop the vh cap + center. No model/testid/coordinate changes (Invaders keeps width-driven drag-steer). Gate: precommit + **all 5 games' emulator e2e 10/10**.
- **Smoke owed (Jacek, device):** each game's field fills the screen; Read Warrior no longer cut off.

## 2026-06-18 вҖ” [FIX] Tactic save "too many index entries" вҖ” exempt freehandStrokes (Jacek prod report)
**INDEXES (firestore:indexes deployed). No app/rules/data change.**
- Saving a tactic with a dense perfect-freehand drawing failed: *"Save failed: too many index entries for entity /workspaces/ranger1996/layoutOverlays/вҖҰ/tactics/вҖҰ"*. Root cause: Firestore auto-indexes every array element, and `freehandStrokes` (thousands of stroke points via `strokesToFirestore`) blew past the **40,000 index-entries-per-document** write limit вҶ’ the create was rejected (doc never written).
- Fix: `firestore.indexes.json` `fieldOverrides` exempt `tactics.{freehandStrokes,strokes,drawings}` from single-field indexing (`"indexes": []`). These are drawing blobs, never queried by these fields вҶ’ zero query impact. `firebase deploy --only firestore:indexes` (additive; exemptions apply immediately, no index build). Re-saving the tactic now succeeds.
- Note: longer-term, packing `freehandStrokes` as a single string would avoid array-indexing entirely (optional follow-up; exemption is the correct immediate fix).

## 2026-06-18 вҖ” [PERF] Packed catalog cold-load вҖ” kill the players spinner (Jacek GO)
**App (auto-deploy) + RULES + DATA (additive). Merge `eb59bf5f` (branch `feat/catalog-packed-load`).**
- **Root:** the per-page loading spinner is the global `/players` cold-load вҖ” measured **2,579 docs / ~1.47 MB / ~2,579 reads** (`/teams` 307/100 KB is fine; cache works, this is the cold path / iOS IDB-eviction path). Firestore pagination rejected вҖ” it breaks complete `playersById` lookups (assignments/roster/opponent). Field-slimming rejected вҖ” audit showed most fields are used.
- **Fix:** packed catalog. `/players`+`/teams` collapsed into `/catalog/{kind}` manifest + `/catalog/{kind}/chunks/{i}` (full docs, ~526 KB/chunk). Cold load reads **~6 docs instead of ~2,886** вҖ” win is per-doc SDK/parse/IndexedDB overhead. **All fields kept вҶ’ zero consumer changes.** Version-gated by the SAME `/meta/catalogVersion` marker вҶ’ exactly as fresh/stale as today. **Fallback-safe:** absent/stale/invalid packed вҶ’ live `getDocs` (today's behaviour) вҶ’ no regression. Self-heal: a super_admin reload after a version bump rewrites the pack.
- **RULES (deployed):** `match /catalog` read=authed, write=super_admin (mirrors `/meta`; global, **NOT** a tenant-isolation predicate). `firestore.rules` compiled + released.
- **DATA (additive):** `pack-catalog.cjs --live` wrote `/catalog/players` (3 chunks/2,579) + `/catalog/teams` (1 chunk/307) @ version 1781645783776; read-back verified complete + version-matched. `/players`/`/teams` untouched.
- Gate: precommit + build; packer dry+live verified. Brief: `docs/CC_BRIEF_CATALOG_PACKED_LOAD.md`. Diag: `scripts/diag/{catalog-coldload,scouted-subset}-read.cjs`.
- **Smoke owed (Jacek, prod after the app deploy lands):** roster page (Players / a scouted team) loads noticeably faster; squads/rosters still resolve (no blank). Deferred follow-ups: scouted-subset+lazy picker, iOS IDB resilience.

## 2026-06-18 вҖ” [FIX+FEATURE] Scout auto-enter active event (Majma) + super-admin Dev Snapshot button (Jacek GO)
**App (auto-deploy, e2e-gated). No rules/data.** Merge `f3d24baa` (branch `feat/dev-snapshot-button`).
- **Scout stranded on "Nie masz jeszcze przydziaЕӮu" (Majma, ranger1996):** root cause was NOT his settings вҖ” his `userRoles=["player","scout"]` were correct and the workspace had 2 open tournaments. A scout-only user has no tournament picker (single-path B4 design) and there is no coach-side scoutвҶ’event assignment, so `tournamentId` stayed null вҶ’ `tournament` null вҶ’ `ScoutWaitingEmptyState` even with open events. **Fix:** when `isScoutOnly` and no tournament selected, auto-select the most-recently-created `status==='open'` tournament (persisted). Waiting state now shows only when there is genuinely no active event; coaches/admins keep their picker flow. Added `scripts/diag/majma-scout-read.cjs` (read-only diagnostic).
- **Dev Snapshot button (super-admin only):** floating вҢ– button (self-gates via `useIsSuperAdmin`, inert otherwise) вҖ” captures `document.body` via html2canvas + a JSON context bundle (route/page/device/lang/data) and exports ONE `.json` via the iOS Share Sheet (AirDrop/Files) or desktop download, to hand real screens to the design workspace. Mounted once in `MainPage`'s `AppShell`. No Firestore reads/writes, no rules change. `npm i html2canvas` (prod dep). Optional `__pbSnapshotContext` page-data publishing deferred to v1+ (needs PII anonymisation). В§27 PASS.
- **Follow-up `b6ce1ae1`:** the button was mounted in `MainPage`'s `AppShell` вҶ’ only on the `/` route. Moved the single mount to `App.jsx` (alongside `OfflineBanner`/`ViewAsIndicator`, inside `HashRouter` after `Routes`) so it floats over EVERY authenticated screen; removed the `MainPage` mount (no double button). Still `useIsSuperAdmin`-gated.
- Gate: `npm run precommit` (build + lint-ui) passed for all changes; e2e runs in the deploy workflow.
- **Smoke owed (Jacek/Majma, prod):** Majma reloads вҶ’ lands in an open tournament with events; super-admin sees the вҢ– button on every screen and a snapshot exports.

## 2026-06-17 вҖ” [REFACTOR/FIX] Canonical pointPhases module + consumer migration (PaT D4, Jacek GO)
**App (auto-deploy). No rules/data.** Tier-1 (within GO'd brief; refactor + bug-fix). Merge `7baaf9e3` (foundation `706301af` + migration `d5ef57bd`).
- **Single source = `src/utils/pointPhases.js`.** The phase axis (`PHASES` + `ALIAS`) and selectors (`capturePhases`/`playPhases`/`coachReportPhases`/`isReasonRadial`/`label`/`toPersistedLiteral`/`fromPersistedLiteral`/`normalizeKey`/`order`/`INPLAY`) now drive every consumer вҖ” MatchPage capture+review, `StageSwitcher`, `dataService.mergeStreamTimelines`, `generateInsights`, `HeatmapCanvas`, ScoutedTeam coach report вҖ” replacing scattered literals/icon-maps/`STAGE_ORDER`s. Adding/renaming/remapping a phase is one edit.
- **Two consumer bugs fixed (one root cause).** `capturePhases()` returns phase OBJECTS; `.map(toPersistedLiteral)` passed objects where a key string was expected вҶ’ `undefined`. (a) MatchPage `PHASE_SEGMENTS` вҶ’ `PHASE_ICON[obj]` undefined вҶ’ `<SegIcon>` undefined вҶ’ **"Element type is invalid вҖҰ render method of MatchPage"** ErrorBoundary crash (the phase-view regression / the Sentry class). (b) dataService `STAGE_ORDER` вҶ’ object stage keys never matched вҶ’ merged `timeline.length 0` (concurrent-merge). Both вҶ’ `.map(p => toPersistedLiteral(p.key))`. NOTE: prod `main` never had `capturePhases` (literal `['break','settle','mid']` + complete icon map), so the live Sentry report was a stale-cache/pre-fix artifact, not current-prod code; this merge closes the class going forward.
- **Scope per ratified D4 (2026-06-16):** capture is the SUBSET break/settle/mid. `endgame` ships `captureEnabled:false` (reserved like `preBreakout`/`outcome`) вҶ’ in the model axis, in NO capture/report UI; read-side endgame branches are inert, data-gated forward-compat. The older inline brief's "build Endgame capture" was superseded by the ratification (doc = source of truth).
- Doc: `POINT_AS_TIMELINE.md` В§2 D4 notes `pointPhases.js` as the single source. Gate: precommit + **88/88 functional e2e** + phase-view/concurrent-merge/matchreview-rail/scoutedteam-rail. В§27 PASS (refactor; no new visual surface).
- **Smoke owed:** open a scouted/match point with Settle/Mid keyframes in review вҶ’ phase row Break/Settle/Mid switches + в–¶ play, no crash; two-coach concurrent end-match merge reflects both sides.

Keyframes in `global.css`; splash is **decorative `pointer-events:none`** (never blocks the form or e2e); `prefers-reduced-motion` вҶ’ fade-only. One-shot per LoginPage mount (no JS gate вҖ” a side-effecting useState initializer is StrictMode-unsafe).
- e2e: `login-branding` (splash renders + non-blocking + lockup present); `invite-register` + `pwa-offline` still green. Gate **88/88**. В§27: amber dot = brand mark (consistent with the app icon / NavDrawer ball / Reads Mini), form CTA interactive.
- **вҡ  iOS NOTE:** the home-screen icon is cached at add-to-home-screen time вҶ’ existing installs keep the OLD icon until **removed + re-added**. Android picks up the new icon via the updated manifest + SW.

## 2026-06-17 вҖ” [FIX] ScoutedTeam landscape вҖ” report column squeezed by unfolded rail Isolate (Jacek regression, high)
**App (auto-deploy). No rules/data.** Tier-1. Merge `8c8145fb` (live: chunk `ScoutedTeamPage-C2Y8XNtB.js`).
- **Symptom:** landscape scouted-team showed only the Breakouts header (no rows); portrait fine (Jacek's key diagnostic вҶ’ not a data/phase bug, a landscape layout bug).
- **Brief root-cause was STALE:** the brief blamed the `!(landscape && heroAvailable)` guard at `:1199` for hiding the whole report column. Verified false вҖ” that guard wraps ONLY the heatmap section; `columnEl` (the report) IS passed to the rail in landscape (`rail={<>{fvControlZonesEl}{columnEl}</>}`).
- **Actual cause:** the rail's Isolate `RailZone` rendered all 14 roster players (`RailItemList`), eating the rail/overlay height so `columnEl` (a `flex:1` sibling below the zones) collapsed to a sliver вҶ’ only the Breakouts header peeked through. The earlier fold (`ca401205`/portrait) only touched `heatmapControlsEl`, never the rail zone.
- **Fix (shell-level, reusable):** `RailZone` gained optional `collapsible`/`defaultCollapsed` (chevron header, active selection shown while folded). The ScoutedTeam Isolate zone now folds by default вҶ’ the report column keeps its real estate. Match-review uses the same column-in-rail pattern but its rail column is a narrow points list, so it never hit the squeeze; the fold is now available to any long zone.
- **Did NOT** re-litigate the phase anchor (breakouts stay per-phase per Jacek).
- e2e: tablet-landscape (collapses вҶ’ вҳ° overlay) вҶ’ `scouted-report-column` height >220 + Isolate folded by default, expands on tap. Gate **87/87**, В§27 PASS.

## 2026-06-17 вҖ” [FIX] ScoutedTeam вҖ” Breakouts table anchored to Break + Isolate folded (Jacek feedback)
**App (auto-deploy). No rules/migration.** Tier-1 follow-up to the same-day Stage 2.5 ship. Merge `27c43909`.
- **Regression:** Jacek reported the breakout % table "disappeared" when exploring the new phase switcher on **legacy pre-phase data** (Czech/Prague вҖ” points have no `timeline[]`, and are per-coach single-side stream docs). Stage 2.5 had made the Breakouts memo follow `hmPhase`; on Settle/Mid the table shifted/looked lost.
- **Fix:** Breakouts is now **anchored to Break** (`computeBreakSurvival(вҖҰ, 'break')`, no `hmPhase` dep) вҖ” "breakout survival" is inherently a break-phase concept + the priority coach read, so it ALWAYS shows its whole-point numbers regardless of the switcher (= exactly the pre-Stage-2.5 behavior). Shooting + the elim-reason block stay per-stage (genuinely per-stage).
- **Isolate folded:** the per-player isolate selector is now collapsed by default (`isolate-toggle`; secondary drill-down, was crowding the priority table) вҖ” header toggles the chips, shows the active isolate inline.
- e2e: pat-stage25 UI test extended (isolate folded by default); functional gate 86/86. В§27 PASS.

## 2026-06-17 вҖ” [FEATURE] PaT Stage 2.5 вҖ” coach-report per-stage tables (global phase control)
**App (auto-deploy via deploy.yml). NO rules, NO capture change, NO migration.** Tier-1 (read-side aggregation + display; brief "ship on green" + standing Tier-1 autonomy). Merge `da06f0e9`.
- **Gap closed:** Stage 2.5(A) heatmap-per-phase was already shipped (В§B/`hmPhase`); the GAP was the NUMERIC tables вҖ” Breakouts + Shooting aggregated over the whole point, and `eliminationReasons` (captured 2b) appeared in NO table. Now the global `hmPhase` control (Break/Settle/Mid) drives heatmap **and** Breakouts + Shooting + a new elim-reason breakdown together вҖ” one coherent per-phase view.
- **`generateInsights`:** `computeBreakSurvival` + `computeShotTargets` take a `stage` param (default `'break'` = today's numbers вҶ’ no regression); new `computeEliminationReasons`. Shared module-scope `kfOf` + `stageSideData` mirror the callout-zone per-stage idiom вҖ” Break = kf#0; Settle = settle keyframe (legacy point-level fallback so old points still populate); Mid = mid keyframe (no fallback вҶ’ graceful empty). Break shooting stays merged kf#0 (parity); Settle = obstacle band; Mid = mid-keyframe band.
- **FINDING (premise correction):** the brief assumed "read-side only, the data is already there," but the normalizer `mapOnePointForTeam` **DROPPED** the per-keyframe `eliminationReasons` вҖ” so it was NOT at the read site. Added the one-line carry through normalization (still zero-writes, read-side). The captured-but-invisible reasons are now surfaced вҖ” the highest-value piece.
- **UI:** `ScoutedTeamPage` memos depend on `hmPhase`; new elim-reason block reuses the Breakouts/Shooting table-row idiom (neutral data styling, В§27 вҖ” no amber). `SegmentedControl` gained an optional per-item `testId` (additive). i18n `section_elim_reasons` (pl+en); reason labels reuse the existing 2b `reason_*` keys.
- **e2e:** `pat-stage25-report.spec.js` вҖ” (1) bridge per-stage distinctness (breakouts/shots/reasons follow the stage + graceful-empty on a no-timeline point), (2) UI proof the global control toggles the reason block per phase (TRN_PHASE seeded settle=gunfight/mid=penalty). Functional gate **86/86**; В§27 self-review PASS.
- **Smoke owed (Jacek):** open a scouted team with Settle/Mid points вҶ’ switch Break/Settle/Mid вҶ’ confirm Breakouts/Shooting numbers + the "why eliminated" block track the phase.

## 2026-06-17 вҖ” [FEATURE] Reads Mini "Take a Break" game + global leaderboard (В§117 STAGE 2)
**App (auto-deploy via deploy.yml) + Firestore RULES (manual, deployed).** Tier-2 (new feature, В§117 LOCKED spec; GO'd "anything waiting on go" 2026-06-17 вҖ” STAGE 1 docs had explicitly awaited GO for STAGE 2 build). Merge `186071e6`.
- **Game:** Game&Watch-style catch game shipped into the app вҖ” 4 lanes, amber falling balls, slide-catcher, 3 misses = game over, speed ramps with score, Game A (3 lanes) / Game B (4, faster), misses reset at 200/500, flash each Г—100, score 0вҖ“9999 (7-seg). **Pure DOM/CSS + SVG вҖ” no canvas, no game engine, no new dep**, lazy own chunk (`ReadsMiniPage` 17 kB / 5.9 gz). Arcade layer: attract loop (title вҶ” HIGH SCORES) + 3-letter initials on a personal best. Audio: WebAudio SFX + bg music loop (graceful if asset absent), music/sfx mute toggles, `prefers-reduced-motion`. Art split into swappable layer components (GhostGrid/Conveyors/Feeders/Catcher/Ball/Splat) so hand-drawn art can replace a layer later.
- **Leaderboard:** ONE global board `leaderboards/readsMini/scores/{uid}`, best per account (Spark, **no Functions**). `dataService.getReadsMiniTop/getReadsMiniMyScore/submitReadsMiniScore`.
- **RULES (deployed):** `match /leaderboards/{board}/scores/{uid}` вҖ” read = any authed; create/update own-doc only, int 0..9999, `[A-Z]{3}` initials, monotonic score, 5s write cooldown, no delete. `firebase deploy --only firestore:rules`, compiled clean, released. В§117.6 deliberate exceptions: global board crosses workspace isolation BY DESIGN (recreational, no scouting data) + arcade initials (no PII/GDPR). **NEW top-level collection вҖ” NOT a tenant-isolation predicate change.**
- **Entry:** shared `TakeABreakSection` at the very bottom of BOTH More drawers (`MoreTabContent` + `TrainingMoreTab`), ungated (every role). Lazy `/break` route.
- **e2e:** `reads-mini.spec.js` вҖ” full UI flow (drawer entry вҶ’ attract вҶ’ start вҶ’ playing controls вҶ’ GAME OVER вҶ’ back) + leaderboard WRITE against the REAL rules via the emulator bridge (create/update, reject-lower, **cross-uid write DENIED**). Functional gate `npm run test:e2e` **84/84**. Test bridge dead-eliminated from prod (dist grep for `__pbtest` clean).
- **OWED:** (1) **audio asset** `public/sounds/sky-catcher-loop60.m4a` вҖ” drop it in (60s AAC loop); until then bg music degrades silently (SFX work, synthesized). (2) **STAGE 3 App Check** (reCAPTCHA v3 web, app-wide enforcement) вҖ” separate GO.

## 2026-06-16 вҖ” [FEATURE] Player dedup Item 1 вҖ” import-prevention (pbliId claim / ambiguous-flag)
**App + e2e, NO rules change.** Tier-2 (identity), Jacek GO. Item 1 of `docs/briefs/CC_BRIEF_PLAYER_DEDUP.md`.
- **Fix:** the player CSV import (`CSVImport.jsx`) no longer creates a duplicate when a row HAS a pbliId but no pbliId-match and a **pbliId-less namesake exists on a different team**. New `src/utils/playerImportDedup.js` (`resolvePbliImport`, pure) decides: **exactly one exact-name pbliId-less doc вҶ’ CLAIM** (stamp pbliId + append team); **2+ or a different-pbliId namesake вҶ’ FLAG** (create + log a "super-admin to merge" warning in the import report); **none вҶ’ create**. Terminal for the pbliId case (never falls into the old team-scoped name-path that re-created dups). Conservative threshold (auto-claim only the single unambiguous case вҖ” identity = high blast radius).
- **NOT yet (Items 2-3, follow-on):** persistent reconcile queue + super-admin surface (flags currently surface in the import log for manual `MergePlayersModal` merge) В· migration for existing dups. Both GO-gated; migration `--live` = Hard-ESCALATE.
- **e2e:** `player-dedup.spec.js` вҖ” resolver covers all 4 decisions (create / claim / flag-different-pbliId / flag-2+) + case/whitespace-insensitive name match (deterministic, via bridge). `roster-division` unaffected. build + precommit green.

## 2026-06-16 вҖ” [FIX/CLOSE] B26 closed вҖ” retire the misframed roster-repair box + author the dedup brief
**App (CoachTabContent box removal) + doc.** Tier-1 (UI removal, non-destructive, no rules change).
- **B26 investigation verdict:** all framed suspects ruled out вҖ” `tournament` is a LIVE `useTournaments()` subscription (a persisted stamp WOULD collapse the box); `isScout вҶ’ isCoach вҶ’ isAdmin вҶ’ isSuperAdmin` (rules:53) so a super-admin's stamp write is PERMITTED; super correctly saw the `isSuperAdmin` box. The box MISFRAMED the real issue.
- **Real problem (Jacek):** scouted-roster "duplicates" are **player-identity** dups (same first+last, one with `pbliId` / one without) вҖ” `pbliId` is the primary key; multi-team is normal. Root cause = `CSVImport.jsx` Path 2 (`:375-409`) creating a 2nd doc when a pbliId row's exact name matches a pbliId-less doc on a *different* team. NOT roster narrowing.
- **Done:** RETIRED the permanent В§83 B3 super-admin roster-repair box from `CoachTabContent` (box + state + handler + toast + `useIsSuperAdmin` import). The narrowing fn (`repairScoutedRostersForTournament`) stays in dataService (non-destructive orphan-preserving union; `roster-division.spec` still covers it, incl. the new `stampError` field). Authored `docs/briefs/CC_BRIEF_PLAYER_DEDUP.md` (policy: obviousвҶ’auto-claim, ambiguousвҶ’flag super-admin via MergePlayersModal; needs GO + threshold ratified).
- Build green.

## 2026-06-16 вҖ” [DOC/CANON] Field View archetypes ratified вҖ” Phase C CLOSED
**Doc-only** (`docs/architecture/FIELD_VIEW_ARCHETYPES.md` new). Jacek ratified TWO legitimate field-view archetypes вҖ” a deliberate design choice, NOT debt:
- **RAIL-NATIVE** (`CanvasRailLayout` + shell slots) вҖ” review/coach/scout/stats: Match-review, ScoutedTeam, PlayerStats, Hitability (the family is now consistent).
- **В§76 IMMERSIVE** (`useLandscapeMode`) вҖ” EDITORS: LayoutDetail, Tactic (full canvas, floating edge-tabs, auto-save). **Editors do NOT migrate to rail** вҖ” immersive is their correct frame.
- Not field views: BunkerEditor/Ballistics (plain/query, no rail) В· TrainingResults (dashboard).
- The canon carries the decision rule for any NEW field view + the anti-pattern (don't force editors/dashboards onto the rail). **Phase C closed.** Scout-point capture = a separate future structural brief (not now).

Glue measured LOW (stateвҶ’props only). Wiring Scout-point + Match-review follows after the smoke GO.

The EN-literal guard (rule 2b) is clean (5 hits, ~2 actionable aria-labels). Noted for the morning, not shipped.

## 2026-06-15 вҖ” [FEATURE] TacticPage adopts the shared drawing stack (ITEM-1 drawing-tools unify)
**HEAD `4ae31cfc`** (merge of `feat/tactic-drawing-overlay-unify`). **App + e2e, NO rules change.** Tier 1 pure-UI propagation (per `docs/architecture/DRAWING_TOOLS_UNIFICATION_DISCOVERY.md`; Jacek GO on ITEM-1). CI green (`67030f93`); app auto-deployed. Revert: `git revert 4ae31cfc`.
- **What:** TacticPage was the last bespoke-freehand holdout. It now uses the canonical `DrawingOverlay` + `DrawToolbar` + `drawStrokes` stack (the same one ScoutedTeamPage + MatchPage use) via InteractiveCanvas's BaseCanvas draw-arbiter (1-finger draw / 2-finger zoom). Gains 5 colors / 3 sizes / eraser / undo-redo / clear (was hardcoded amber, fixed width, no eraser/undo). Deleted the bespoke overlay `<canvas>`, raw pointer handlers, `redrawStrokes`, ResizeObserver, inline serializer.
- **Data models stay SEPARATE by design** вҖ” `tactic.freehandStrokes` (a play-object field) vs `scouted.annotations` (a per-team annotation blob). Only the COMPONENT unified; no persistence merge, no `--live` migration.
- **Legacy compat:** old points-only strokes (`{"0":[{x,y},...]}`) are normalized to canonical `{color,size,pts}` (amber + **thin**, matching the old 3px line) so existing tactic drawings survive вҖ” no data loss.
- **вҡ  VISIBLE CHANGE (smoke this):** existing freehand now renders via **perfect-freehand** (smoother/tapered outline-fill) instead of simple polylines вҖ” the same look as coach-summary draws (approved). Bolder/rounder than before but same weight (thin). **Owed: Jacek smoke** вҖ” open a tactic with an existing drawing вҶ’ confirm the new render is acceptable; draw a new stroke (colors/sizes/eraser/undo) вҶ’ Save вҶ’ reload persists. If the legacy render looks off, revert is one command.
- **Orthogonal ticket registered (NOT done):** tactics two-store consolidation (layout-level vs tournament-level `tactics`, dual hooks/CRUD, `freehandStrokes` missing from `addLayoutTactic`) вҖ” real debt, independent of this, sized separately in NEXT_TASKS.
- **e2e:** `tactic-drawing.spec.js` вҖ” a tactic with legacy points-only freehand loads on the unified stack + the toolbar wires in (Done appears). Suite 74/0. (Full draw-gesture rides the proven BaseCanvas arbiter, identical to ScoutedTeam вҖ” not re-simulated.)

## 2026-06-15 вҖ” [FIX] Player self-edit no longer fails on the super-only catalog bump (Maks)
**HEAD `db8d4fc2`** (merge of `fix/player-self-edit-catalog-bump`). **App + e2e, NO rules change.** Tier 1 (logic-only). CI green (`3a7ec341`); app auto-deployed. Revert: `git revert db8d4fc2`.
- **Symptom (Jacek/Maks):** "nie mogДҷ zapisaДҮ profilu po edycji" вҖ” a linked player editing their roster identity on /profile fails.
- **Diagnosis (admin-SDK read + fail-first, verified):** Maks IS linked (player `RYRhq5od23oXOCcVAfJA`, owned by ranger1996, linkedUid=Maks, member) вҶ’ the В§85 self-edit write to `players/{id}` is PERMITTED. But `updatePlayer` then awaits `bumpCatalogVersion()`, which writes `/meta/catalogVersion` = **super-admin-write-only**. A non-super edit can't write `/meta` вҶ’ the bump threw AFTER the player doc had already saved вҶ’ false "save failed" (the edit actually persisted). Same latent bug hit ANY non-super edit path (player self-edit + workspace_admin editing a player).
- **Should a player edit their profile? YES** (В§85 carve-out: name/nickname/number/age/favoriteBunker/nationality). The rule already allowed it; only the catalog bump broke it.
- **Fix:** `bumpCatalogVersion` swallows `permission-denied` (best-effort cache hint вҖ” super edits still bump; non-super rely on cache TTL / next super write). No rules change.
- **e2e:** `player-self-edit.spec.js` (non-super linked player self-edits вҶ’ ok). Fail-first proven RED (`ERR:permission-denied`) вҶ’ GREEN. Suite 73/0. Isolated `selfedit-ws` + dedicated linked player fixture.
- **Owed: Jacek smoke** вҖ” Maks edits his profile вҶ’ saves cleanly (no error). His earlier edits likely already persisted server-side (the player write succeeded; only the bump threw).

## 2026-06-15 вҖ” [FIX] createEmailInvite idempotent вҖ” admin re-send no longer 403s
**HEAD `7f4a0f40`** (merge of `fix/invite-resend-idempotent`). **App + e2e, NO rules change.** Tier 1 (logic-only). CI green (`27566695736`); app auto-deployed (deploy.yml). Revert: `git revert 7f4a0f40`.
- **Symptom (Jacek):** creating an email invite for `biuro@epicsports.pl` вҶ’ "insufficient or missing permissions".
- **Root cause (verified empirically вҖ” fail-first returned `ERR:permission-denied`):** `createEmailInvite` used `setDoc` (overwrite); biuro's invite already existed (pending), so the write was an **UPDATE**, and the `/invites` rules grant updates ONLY to the invitee's own self-claim, never to an admin re-issuing вҶ’ 403.
- **Fix:** `createEmailInvite` skips the write when an invite for that email already exists (re-send is a no-op on the doc; the caller still re-sends the email-link). No rules change. Does NOT change an existing invite's role/ws (re-issue-with-change would need an admin-update rule branch вҖ” deferred).
- **e2e:** `invite-resend.spec.js` (admin re-sends to a seeded already-pending address вҶ’ ok). Fail-first proven REDвҶ’GREEN. Suite 72/0.
- **Note for biuro:** the invite already exists + pending; with the already-member self-claim fix (`b81fc558`, deployed) **biuro self-heals on login** вҖ” no new invite needed. This fix just stops the re-send button from erroring.

## 2026-06-15 вҖ” [FIX] Self-claim grants role to an already-member (empty roles) вҖ” biuro unblocked
**HEAD `b81fc558`** (merge of `fix/invite-already-member-claim`). **App + rules + e2e.** Tier 1 logic + rules CONFIRM (Jacek GO 2026-06-15). **CI GREEN** (branch run `27554557207`). `firebase deploy --only firestore:rules` released; app auto-deployed (deploy.yml). Revert: `git revert b81fc558` + redeploy prior rules.
- **Symptom (Jacek STEP-0):** `invites/biuro@epicsports.pl` stuck `pending` вҖ” self-claim never fired live, even though the email-invite onboarding shipped earlier today.
- **Diagnosis (admin-SDK read, `scripts/diag/invite-format-audit.cjs`):** biuro `emailVerified=true` (rules `email_verified` gate NOT the blocker); invite email-keyed + pending + correct; invites collection has **no format split** (2 email-keyed + 16 token-keyed in separate id-spaces вҖ” `getDoc(invites/{email})` resolves cleanly; `createEmailInvite` always email-keyed). **Real blocker:** biuro is **already in `ranger1996.members`** (empty roles, from the old pending-approval flow), and the self-claim rule required `!(uid in members)` вҶ’ the workspace write was DENIED вҶ’ permanent pending. Jacek's `!isEmailSignInLink()`-gate hypothesis ruled out (the claim runs on the post-set-password `#/` load; e2e proves a fresh invitee is claimed).
- **Fix (rule, CONFIRM):** self-claim membership clause `!(uid in members)` вҶ’ **`resource.data.userRoles.get(uid, []) == []`** вҖ” a fresh non-member OR an already-member with empty roles may claim; can't overwrite a non-empty role (the `userRoles[uid] == [invite.role]` + own-key-diff guards still bound the result; verified-email + own-email pending-invite-for-this-slug unchanged).
- **Fix (code):** `EmailLinkSetupPage` now claims the invite **explicitly at activation** (after set-password, before handoff) вҖ” no longer relies on the post-reload background effect; background self-claim stays as the gated retry/no-link fallback.
- **e2e:** `already-member-claim.spec.js` (member+empty-roles+pending-invite вҶ’ login вҶ’ self-claims role вҶ’ in). **Fail-first proven** RED (old rule) вҶ’ GREEN. Full suite 71/0.
- **biuro self-heals on next login** (background self-claim now permitted by the rule) вҖ” no manual grant needed. **Owed: Jacek smoke** вҖ” biuro relogin вҶ’ lands in ranger1996 as coach; + the email-invite smokes from the prior entry still stand (Maks/Tymek cold-open; one fresh email invite end-to-end).

## 2026-06-15 вҖ” [FEATURE] Durable email-link invite onboarding (ships the onboarding arc)
**HEAD `a8ed9cad`** (merge of `feat/email-invite-association`, rebased onto the source-of-truth fix). **App + rules + e2e.** Banked multi-part feature, shipped once both Jacek gates cleared (Console email-link enable + rules CONFIRM, GO 2026-06-15). **CI GREEN on GitHub Actions** (branch run `27549382770`; main deploy run `27550282069` success). `firebase deploy --only firestore:rules` released. App auto-deployed via deploy.yml (e2e-gated). Revert: `git revert a8ed9cad` + redeploy prior rules.
- **Flow (Spark-native, no backend):** admin enters invitee email + role вҶ’ `invites/{email}` pending + `sendSignInLinkToEmail` (Firebase emails the magic link) вҶ’ invitee clicks in ANY browser вҶ’ `EmailLinkSetupPage` express-reg (complete email-link sign-in + set password) вҶ’ on `#/` reload the email-keyed self-claim writes `workspaces/{slug}.members + userRoles[uid]=[role]` (the authoritative store) вҶ’ lands in with role. Browser-agnostic (keyed on the authed email, not a token). Admin "Zaproszenia e-mail" view on MembersPage + token open-link kept as fallback.
- **#166 root cause + fix (the CI-red the branch carried):** `signInWithEmailLink` authenticates mid-express-reg (before set-password), prematurely firing the WorkspaceProvider background effects вҖ” auto-enter (threw on the rules-denied legacy first-entry write) + the self-claim (`reload()`), which re-loaded the still-active email-link URL вҶ’ looped the invitee back to the empty confirm step. **Fix:** gate both effects on `!isEmailSignInLink()` (`useWorkspace` + `useInviteRedemption`) вҖ” the express-reg page owns the session until it replaces the URL with `#/`.
- **Rebased onto source-of-truth (`4ddbf0b2`):** self-claim writes `workspace.userRoles` (authoritative for gate + entry, per today's earlier fix) вҖ” an invited user rides the same fixed entry logic, never the pre-fix shape.
- **Rules (deployed, Jacek CONFIRM вҖ” TENANT-ISOLATION):** two additive branches. `/invites/{email}` claim + `/workspaces/{slug}` self-claim, both gated on `request.auth.token.email_verified == true` (the email-link flow sets it) + own-email match + own-uid + exact invited role + matching pending invite for this slug. Can't escalate, can't touch other members. No existing rule tightened.
- **e2e:** `email-link-invite` (cross-context express-reg), `email-invite-claim` (no-token self-claim), `bulk-invite-claim` (NEW вҖ” two verified invitees self-claim a shared ws in parallel, multi-account window), `admin-pending-invites`. Functional suite green (one unrelated `hitability-responsive` flake passed isolated; CI retries=2 absorbed it).
- **OWED вҖ” Jacek (STEP 5+6, deliberately manual):** (a) grant **`biuro@epicsports.pl`** a role FROM THE APP (Members вҶ’ assign) вҖ” proves the in-app grantвҶ’entry path post source-of-truth fix; if it doesn't land them in, that's a real bug вҶ’ report. (b) **Smoke:** Maks + Tymek cold-open вҶ’ in ranger1996; one fresh email invite end-to-end (enter email вҶ’ recipient gets Firebase email вҶ’ activates вҶ’ lands in, in a different browser than clicked).
- **Onboarding arc CLOSED** with this ship. Next: back to the arc backlog (3 tier-2 gates, arc-B width migration, ITEM-1 drawing, sweeps).

## 2026-06-15 вҖ” [FIT-blocker fix] userRoles authoritative for workspace ENTRY (ranger source-of-truth strand)
**HEAD `4ddbf0b2`** (merge; feature `fix/role-source-truth-entry`). **App-only** (+ e2e + diag tooling). Tier 1 (Jacek GO; logic-only, **NO rules change**). Functional e2e **66/0** (new spec fail-first proven REDвҶ’GREEN); build + precommit green. Revert: `git revert 4ddbf0b2`.
- **Symptom (Jacek, live data):** Maks (`maks090105`) granted `[coach,scout,player]` in `ranger1996.userRoles`, in `members`, yet stuck on "poczekaj na admina"; relogins didn't help. `users/{uid}`: `roles` empty, `defaultWorkspace` null, `linkSkippedAt` set.
- **STEP-1 verdict (corrects the brief's hypothesis):** the gate ALREADY reads `workspace.userRoles[uid]` (both `roles` and `isPendingApproval` via roleUtils), and `linkSkippedAt` ALREADY decouples profile-linking from access (App.jsx:137). The split was **not** in the role store вҖ” it was in **ENTRY**: with `defaultWorkspace` null, `autoEnter` fell back to the `members array-contains` query and entered **`docs[0]` (doc-ID order)**, which for a >1-membership user can be an empty-roles ws вҶ’ PendingApproval, even though another ws held the roles. (Also: the `users/{uid}` self-update rule allows only `displayName/email/linkSkippedAt`, so `roles`/`defaultWorkspace` can't be client-synced on grant вҖ” the brief's option (b) is rules-blocked; option (a) chosen.)
- **Fix:** `autoEnterDefaultWorkspace` now **prefers a membership where `userRoles[uid]` is non-empty** (falls back to `docs[0]` only if none carry roles) вҶ’ `userRoles` authoritative for entry as well as the gate. No cross-user write, no rules change.
- **Live-data caveat (honest):** the audit proved Maks is **single-membership**, so this fix does NOT itself explain his strand (his stuck state is a **stale PWA bundle** pre-dating the 2026-06-14 STEP-9/listener fixes). The fix is **prevention** for the multi-membership class (0 live victims today) + makes entry consistent with the gate.
- **Recovery (STEP-3, --live, Jacek GO):** stamped `users/{maks-uid}.defaultWorkspace=ranger1996` + mirrored `roles` (admin-SDK; client can't write these per rules). Robust across ALL bundle versions (every build since 2026-04-24 enters via the `defaultWorkspace` pointer) вҶ’ lands him in ranger1996 next open regardless of cache. `scripts/diag/recover-stuck-user.cjs` (dry by default).
- **Audit (read-only, `scripts/diag/stranded-accounts-audit.cjs`):** 2 workspaces, 25 users. **3 more stampable** (defaultWorkspace null + role-bearing member of exactly 1 ws): `tymek.parczewski@gmail.com`(ranger1996), `test2@test.com`(pbfit), `rangerplayer@test.pl`(ranger1996). **0** multi-role-bearing. **1** genuinely pending awaiting a grant: `biuro@epicsports.pl`(ranger1996, empty roles). Full list (PII) local-only, gitignored.
- **OWED:** (a) **Jacek GO to batch-stamp the 3** (or just tymek). (b) `biuro@epicsports.pl` needs a role GRANT (not a stamp). (c) **Maks prod smoke** вҖ” relogin / cold-open PWA. (d) **email-invite branch (`feat/email-invite-association`) stays HELD** вҖ” rebase onto this main, then green `email-link-invite` (remaining failure = a distinct auto-enter throw in the express-reg path).
- **Deferred (Jacek):** adding `defaultWorkspace` to the `/users/{uid}` self-update rule allow-list (would persist the auto-enter stamp) вҖ” not load-bearing given the membership fallback; rules-change, deferred.

## 2026-06-14 вҖ” [FIT-blocker fix] Invite token in localStorage + inviteвҶ’register repro (Maks #3)
**HEAD `0f45f552`** (merge; feature `fix/invite-token-localstorage`). **App-only** (+ e2e). Tier 1 (Jacek GO; client-only, **no rules change**). Functional e2e green incl. the new repro. Revert: `git revert <merge>`.
- **Symptom:** several magic-link (invite) accounts authenticated but landed stuck on NoWorkspaceScreen ("poczekaj na admina") and were invisible to admin (no role, no defaultWorkspace, not in `members[]`).
- **Diagnosis (verified by repro):** the manual "UtwГіrz konto" step does NOT break it вҖ” `tests/e2e/invite-register-associate.spec.js` reproduces the exact `#/invite/{token}` вҶ’ switch-to-register вҶ’ register flow and is GREEN (account associated, lands on onboarding, not NoWorkspace). Root cause is **token loss across contexts**: the invite token was stashed in **sessionStorage** (per-tab) and lost when the link was opened in one tab/app and the account finished in another (or reopened later) вҖ” the likely shape for players opening links from chat/email apps.
- **Fix #2 (this commit):** stash the invite token in **localStorage** (`useInviteRedemption.js`) вҖ” survives tabs + sessions in the same browser. Honest limit: cross-BROWSER / chat-app in-app-browser hops still can't carry a client token (covered by the durable follow-up below).
- **NOT done (blocked / deferred):** writing `users/{uid}.defaultWorkspace` on redeem вҖ” the users self-update rule allows only `displayName/email/linkSkippedAt`, so it'd be permission-denied (and isn't load-bearing: `members[]` + the auto-enter members-query already associate). Would need a rules CONFIRM; skipped.
- **STILL OWED (Czechy-critical):** (a) **recovery of the existing stuck accounts** вҖ” admin-SDK associate (Jacek to supply `{UIDвҶ’workspaceвҶ’role}` + GO; --live write). (b) **Durable #3** вҖ” record invite-intent server-side + a super-admin "pending invites / unassociated accounts" view so a lost client token is recoverable and admin can always grant the first role. Structural вҖ” spec for Jacek, not built autonomously.

## 2026-06-14 вҖ” [FIT-blocker fix] Self-claim picker shows the FULL player catalog (Maks #2)
**HEAD `311a2eb0`** (merge; feature `fix/self-claim-full-catalog`). **App-only** (+ e2e). Tier 1 (Jacek-directed; logic-only, **NO rules change**). Functional e2e green (new spec, fail-first proven REDвҶ’GREEN). Revert: `git revert <merge>`.
- **Bug (Jacek):** after the permission-gate fix, Maks opened the player-matching search and saw **nobody** вҖ” should see the whole player DB. **Root cause:** both self-claim pickers (`PbleaguesOnboardingPage` onboarding gate + `ProfilePage` claim) restricted candidates to `players.filter(p => mySlugs.has(p.ownerWorkspaceId))` (В§85 "defense-in-depth" UI filter) вҖ” empty when the user's workspace owns none of the candidate profiles, AND `if (mySlugs.size === 0) return []` (e.g. before `useUserWorkspaces` resolves). Maks (Ranger player) saw none because the filter, not the rules, hid them.
- **Fix:** both pickers now pass the FULL global catalog (`usePlayers()`), dropping the workspace filter + `useUserWorkspaces`. Rules-safe вҖ” `/players` read is open (`auth != null`). `matchPlayers()` shows the unlinked roster on empty query + searches all on a query.
- **Rules note (NOT changed):** the В§85 self-link WRITE carve-out still gates claims to `isMember(resource.data.ownerWorkspaceId)` вҖ” own-workspace profiles claim fine; claiming a profile owned by ANOTHER workspace would be denied. If cross-workspace self-claim is needed, that's a separate В§85 tenant-rules change (**Jacek CONFIRM**). **Owed: Maks smoke** вҖ” confirm he now sees + can claim his (Ranger-owned) profile; if his profile is owned by a different workspace, ping me for the В§85 CONFIRM.
- e2e `player-self-claim-catalog.spec.js` (B4_PLAYER вҖ” unlinked player in a workspace owning zero players) proves the picker surfaces the global roster.

## 2026-06-14 вҖ” [FIT-blocker fix] Maks permission-gate: workspace-listener robustness + recovery gate
**HEAD `96504036`** (merge; feature `fix/maks-permission-gate`). **App-only** (+ e2e seed/bridge). Tier 1 (regression fix, logic-only вҖ” **NO rules change**, so no CONFIRM gate). Functional e2e green (incl. new contract spec; one unrelated quicklog flake passed on isolated re-run); migration-diff 24; precommit green. Revert: `git revert <merge>`.
- **VERDICT (root cause):** NOT the rules. The workspace read allows any member (`uid in resource.data.members`, firestore.rules:247) and `users/{uid}` read is open вҖ” a pending member CAN read (proven: the new contract e2e passes on a clean pending member). The defect is **listener robustness**: `useWorkspace`'s workspace `onSnapshot` had **NO error callback** (and the `users/{uid}` one an **empty** one), and neither re-attached (effect deps = `[slug]`). A transient permission-denied at attach вҖ” e.g. the listener attaching a beat before the self-join membership write lands вҖ” **killed the listener permanently**; a later admin role-grant then never propagated вҶ’ stuck on "poczekaj aЕј admin" forever. This is Maks.
- **Fix (STEP 3):** both listeners get real error handling + the workspace listener gets **bounded auto-re-attach** (3Г— backoff) вҖ” self-heals the transient attach-race without any user action; persistent failure sets `permissionError`.
- **Fix (STEP 4, unconditional):** `permissionError` (set on persistent listener error, or a 12s no-snapshot backstop) renders a new **`PermissionErrorScreen`** ("Nie udaЕӮo siДҷ sprawdziДҮ uprawnieЕ„ вҖ” odЕӣwieЕј") with retry+signout вҖ” the no-eternal-loading principle applied to the permission gate; a swallowed listener error can never strand a user again.
- **Coverage (STEP 5):** `tests/e2e/pending-approval-refresh.spec.js` proves the live-refresh CONTRACT (pending member + admin grant вҶ’ gate clears вҶ’ app, no reload). The recovery-path e2e was dropped: the Firestore **emulator does not deliver permission-denied to an active listener on mid-session revocation** (verified вҖ” removed member stays frozen, no error event) and getDoc shares the listener channel, so the error path can't be induced in-emulator. PROD errors on attach-time denial (Maks's case) вҶ’ re-attach + recovery fire there. Recovery is build/logic-verified.
- **Owed: Jacek + Maks prod smoke** вҖ” have Maks relogin in his PWA: the re-attach/recovery should land him in the app without us touching his device. Also a general pending-inviteвҶ’grant smoke before NXL Czechy.

## 2026-06-14 вҖ” [arc-B migration] UserDetailPage вҶ’ <Screen archetype=detail> (640)
**HEAD `128280ca`** (merge; feature in branch `arc-b-user-detail`). **App-only** (+ e2e). Tier 1 by-proof. Migration diff gate **2/2** (phone+tablet=0); full migration-diff **24 green**; functional **62 green**. Revert: `git revert <merge>`. **12/~18 migrated.** Desktop caps to detail tier 640 (was uncapped outer / inner 720); phone+tablet unchanged. Register row added.
- **Unblocked the deferred page:** the prior attempt hit 68px content noise (async `getDoc(profile)` raced the 1500ms screenshot wait). Fixed deterministically: (1) `data-testid="user-detail-loaded"` on the loaded content + a per-page `waitFor` in the harness (captures the loaded state, never the spinner); (2) the super fixture's `createdAt` pinned to a FIXED epoch (was live `now`) вҖ” UserDetail renders "DoЕӮД…czyЕӮ {createdAt}" and the gate reseeds per run, so a live timestamp flaked that row. Inner content keeps its 720 cap below desktop (phone+tablet identical); only desktop narrows to 640.
- Preserved `background: COLORS.bg` + `minHeight: 100dvh` (not Screen's default 100vh) via the `style` prop; `padBottom` default (old shell had `paddingBottom:80`). **Owed: Jacek smoke** вҖ” a user-detail page on desktop (640) vs phone/tablet.

## 2026-06-14 вҖ” [HOTFIX] i18n t('k')(args) auto-invoke crash class + lint + pagination e2e
**HEAD `2f35785d`** (merge; fix `f7b22522`). **App-only** (+ lint, e2e seed). Tier 1 (regression fix + machine-proven). Functional e2e **62 green**; migration-diff **22 green**; precommit (incl. new lint) green. Revert: `git revert 2f35785d`.
- **Prod crash (Jacek):** AdminPlayersPage "Strona undefined z undefined" / `t('admin_teams_page_n_of_m') is not a function`. **Root cause:** `useLanguage`'s `t()` AUTO-INVOKES function values (`t(key, ...args) => typeof v==='function' ? v(...args) : v`), so the footgun `t('k')(a,b)` invokes with NO args first (вҶ’ a string), then calls that string вҶ’ crash. Correct shape: `t('k', a, b)`. **Genuine source bug** (my first-pass "stale cache" read was WRONG вҖ” node bypassed t(); the e2e caught what static analysis alone couldn't).
- **10 footgun call sites fixed** (`t('k')(вҖҰ)` вҶ’ `t('k', вҖҰ)`): AdminPlayers + AdminTeams pagers, all 4 MergePlayersModal interpolators (**would crash the merge-players flow on open** вҖ” never e2e-covered), `ppt_step_counter` (also a MISSING key, added), `reset_sent`, `line_draw_banner`, `user_global_role_promote/revoke_body` (last 4 were ALSO `{placeholder}` static strings вҶ’ converted to function interpolators in pl+en).
- **Lint (durable gap closed):** `scripts/lint-i18n-shapes.js` wired into `npm run precommit` вҖ” Rule A flags `t('k')(вҖҰ)` chained invocation (crash footgun); Rule B flags `t('k', вҖҰargs)` where `k` isn't a function in both langs (silent arg-drop вҶ’ literal `{placeholder}`). The t()-WITHOUT-SCOPE lint remains separately owed (sibling, different mechanism).
- **Coverage (twin of the Quick-log gap):** pagers only render at `totalPages>1`; the 15-player seed never paginated. Seed +40 padding players (55 вҶ’ 2 pages, `teamId:null` so they hit only the two unfiltered global lists); `tests/e2e/admin-pagination.spec.js` exercises the pager вҖ” **fail-first organic: RED on the buggy code, GREEN after.** Re-baselined `players` + `admin-players` snapshots (the prior admin-players baseline had captured the crash screen).
- **Owed: Jacek prod smoke** вҖ” AdminPlayers/AdminTeams pagination (>1 page), the super-admin merge-players modal, LoginPage reset-sent toast, UserDetail promote/revoke, LayoutDetail line-draw banner.

## 2026-06-13 вҖ” [HOTFIX] training quick-log crash ("can't find variable t")
**HEAD `0e50625a`.** **App-only.** Tier 1 (regression fix). Functional **61 green**. Revert: `git revert 0e50625a`.
- **Crash (Jacek):** training matchup вҶ’ Quick вҖә вҶ’ ReferenceError. `PlayerTileGrid` is a MODULE-LEVEL sub-component in `QuickLogView.jsx` (outside the main component's `const { t }` scope); the i18n regression-sweep added `t('quicklog_win_label')` at line 927 without giving it its own `useLanguage()` вҶ’ threw on the player-pick render. Fix = `const { t } = useLanguage()` in PlayerTileGrid.
- **Why it escaped:** the QuickLogView quick-log path had ZERO e2e coverage (log-point covers MatchPage only). Added `quicklog-render.spec.js` (fail-first verified RED on revert) via the training matchup вҶ’ Quick вҖә CTA.
- **Follow-up (`605a65f3`, same deploy session):** repo-wide scan for the class (a scope calling `t()` with no `t` in it) found **2 more latent crashes**, both fixed: **CoachTabContent** (tournament coach tab вҖ” no `useLanguage` at all, `t()` Г—4) and **ShotMenuOverlay** (ShotDrawer precision-shot menu вҖ” module-level sub-component, B13 added `t('b13_delete_shot')` without a hook). 3 other scan hits are false positives (receive `t` as a prop). **Owed: Jacek smoke** вҖ” training matchup вҶ’ Quick вҶ’ player grid + WIN labels В· tournament Coach tab renders В· precision-shot tap вҶ’ delete menu.

## 2026-06-13 вҖ” [feature] Hitability track-mode per-target shot sheet (Jacek-requested)
**HEAD `f2a122da`.** **App-only.** Tier 1.5 (propagation of the approved STEP-2 long-press gesture). Functional suite **60 green**; all 5 hitability specs green. Revert: `git revert f2a122da`.
- **Problem (Jacek):** in tracking, the rail's flat all-hits list is very hard to navigate to undo a specific target's mis-recorded shots. A plain tap can't open a list вҖ” tap IS the record gesture.
- **Fix:** long-press a target in track mode вҶ’ a bottom sheet (`target-shot-sheet`) of just THAT target's shots, each with `Г—` delete. Reuses `hitsForTarget` + `delHit` + the HitList row idiom + ActionSheet scrim/slide. `HitabilityCanvas` long-press arming moved out of the config-only early-return (drag stays config-only; the existing `longFired` guard suppresses tap-record so a hold never also records). i18n `hitability_target_shots_*` (pl+en). Isolated `TRN_HIT_TRACK` fixture + e2e (recordвҶ’long-pressвҶ’deleteвҶ’count drops).
- **Owed: Jacek smoke** вҖ” track mode, tap target to record, **long-press the target** вҶ’ its shot list вҶ’ delete вҶ’ count drops. **Discoverability note:** the trigger is long-press (consistent with the config-mode editor); no on-screen hint added вҖ” say the word and I'll add a track-hint line ("przytrzymaj cel = lista strzaЕӮГіw").

**рҹ”Ҙ RULES DEPLOYED (CONFIRM):** `isMember(slug)` get()-based check failed ALL list-queries ("Null value error") вҶ’ every `members array-contains` silently denied; prod symptom: В§92 switcher never showed >1 ws for non-super-admins, defaultWorkspace-less members dead-ended. Fix = membership via `resource.data` (list-provable, same semantics). Emulator-proven + regression e2e. **Smoke: multi-ws account should now see the switcher row.**
