## 2026-06-12 вҖ” [FULL-DAY STEP 2] Hitability marker popup вҖ” alias/colour/delete (decision (b)-extended)
**HEAD `1fe1ac1b`** (merge `--no-ff` of `feat/hitability-marker-popup`, `67addb66`). **App-only вҖ” no rules/index.** В§7.6 v2 **Tier 1** under the GO'd full-day brief вҖ” the gesture-conflict escalation resolved by Jacek's decision **(b)-extended** (2026-06-12), which IS the design spec. Full emulator e2e **30/30 green**. **REVERT:** `git revert -m 1 1fe1ac1b` вҶ’ rebuild вҶ’ deploy.

**The tap-model (decision (b)-extended):** plain tap in Config = LINKING, unchanged (tap position вҶ’ tap target вҶ’ link; the dominant flow untouched). The marker editor popup opens from TWO places: **long-press (вүҘ500ms) on a canvas marker** (quick path; movement/drag cancels, pointer-captured so the release never closes the fresh modal) and **tap on a rail list row** (discoverable path вҖ” the rail rows are where you look for a target by name; the `Г—` keeps the В§C delete idiom via stopPropagation). Config hint gains the second line ("Przytrzymaj marker lub tapnij wiersz na liЕӣcie, aby edytowaДҮ").

**The editor:** alias `name` (positions + targets; empty reverts to the default label вҖ” key dropped from the whole-array config write, no `undefined` in Firestore arrays) + **pair colour** on positions only (ratified semantics: the position's colour paints the pair; targets inherit via the owner ring) + delete routing to the existing В§C cascade/confirm. One accent CTA (Zapisz); UsuЕ„ = danger.

**Alias render-everywhere:** rail rows, ActionSheet choosers, track hit list, Summary breakdown, layout-analytics section, ConfirmModal copy (del msgs now take the display name), linking hint + a 9px halo label under the canvas marker. Data model additive (`name` on the config marker objects; `updateHitabilityConfig` passes arrays wholesale вҖ” no dataService/rules change).

**e2e:** new `hitability-popup.spec.js` on an ISOLATED `TRN_HIT_POP`/`lay-hit-pop` fixture (the spec renames + creates the first link; shared-state rule): plain-tapвҶ’link regression (no popup), long-pressвҶ’popupвҶ’alias persists in the row, row-tapвҶ’same popup prefilled. Suite 30/30 incl. delete/tabs/responsive regressions. Also: `.gitignore` now covers `tests/results-*/` probe outputs.

**Owed: Jacek prod smoke** вҖ” Config: plain tap still links; long-press marker вҶ’ popup; row tap вҶ’ popup; alias widoczny na canvasie/listach/Summary; kolor pary zmienia ring celu.

Unit test `intensity-ramp.spec.js`.

## 2026-06-11 вҖ” [fix] scouted-team no-eternal-Loading + client-sort scouted teams
**HEAD `48c3f402`** (merge `--no-ff` of `fix/scouted-team-loader-state`). **App-only вҖ” no rules/index.** В§1 of the audit-triage instruction; Jacek GO.

**Origin:** the v2-final audit flagged scouted-team as a 55s "hang" (P0). Investigation verdict: **not a perf/compute problem** вҖ” perf harness showed all 9 aggregations <4ms; CPU profile showed **97% idle**; the page sat on an eternal "вҸі LoadingвҖҰ". Root cause: `subscribeScoutedTeams`/`fetchScoutedTeams` used **`orderBy('createdAt')`**, and Firestore `orderBy` **silently excludes docs missing the field**. The audit seed's scouted docs lacked `createdAt` вҶ’ scouted query empty вҶ’ `ScoutedTeamPage`'s `!tournament || !team` gate spun forever. **Read-only prod probe: 174/174 scouted docs carry `createdAt` (0 missing) вҶ’ does NOT reproduce on prod.** So this was a seed-surfaced fragility; the fix is preventive + robustness.

**Fix:**
- **#3 client-sort (`dataService.js`):** drop `orderBy('createdAt')` from `subscribeScoutedTeams`/`fetchScoutedTeams`; fetch unordered + sort by `createdAt` client-side вҶ’ createdAt-less docs are no longer invisible. Rules-guard unchanged (collection query still needs `/scouted` `list`/`isMember`).
- **#2 no-eternal-loading (`ScoutedTeamPage.jsx`, class-wide rule):** the loader distinguishes still-loading (subscriptions in flight, <12s) from resolved-but-absent/timed-out вҶ’ renders an explicit **"Couldn't load this scouted team" + Retry** (shared `EmptyState`+`Btn`), never an infinite spinner. Also covers a deleted/invalid scouted-team URL on prod.

**e2e (fail-first):** `tests/e2e/scouted-team-loader.spec.js` вҖ” render path (the createdAt-less demo scouted doc renders; RED pre-fix) + error-state path (invalid id вҶ’ error, not spinner). **Full emulator suite 25/25.** Build + precommit PASS.

**Docs:** PROJECT_GUIDELINES Firestore gotcha (`orderBy` silently drops field-less docs). **NEXT_TASKS:** arc-B rollout of the no-eternal-loading pattern + DEFERRED the layout-scope fan-out refactor (read-volume; not the hang cause). Seed fix + В§1 investigation tooling live on `audit/cross-device-2026-06` (`d481e57a`).

## 2026-06-10 вҖ” [fix] non-blocking + throttled non-admin workspace cold-load
**HEAD `358f840d`** (merge `--no-ff` of `fix/auto-enter-nonblocking` / `ceaebe14`). **App-only вҖ” no rules/index.** Harness-stabilization brief Stage 1; Jacek GO (merge + prod deploy).

**Problem (triple-justified):** every non-admin (scouts/players = the FIT majority) saw a >1s blocking "Preparing your workspaceвҖҰ" on every cold load AND triggered a Firestore write per app-open (member arrayUnion no-op + `lastAccess` serverTimestamp) вҖ” pure write-volume waste at tournament scale; also blocked audit capture for scout/player (20/20 hard-timeout, reproducible).

**Fix (`src/hooks/useWorkspace.jsx`):** BOTH cold-load paths now render from the `getDoc` READ вҖ” the blocking path is READ-ONLY, never an awaited write:
- `autoEnterDefaultWorkspace` (first-ever / no-localStorage load) вҖ” the path the brief named.
- **session-restore effect** (localStorage present вҖ” the DOMINANT returning-user path; NOT named in the brief, caught empirically by the new e2e: run 1 failed here with only auto-enter fixed).

`lastAccess` bump (workspace-level field; sole consumer = `TournamentPicker` sort, so day-granularity suffices) + `members[]` self-heal are now **fire-and-forget (no await) + throttled** вҖ” skip if `lastAccess` <24h old вҮ’ вүӨ1 write/workspace/day. First-ever join keeps its AWAITED membership write (approval gate + post-render membership-gated reads; once per user, not the per-cold-load path). **No rules change** (writes stay within the self-join envelope allowlist). Also fixed a latent `ReferenceError` in the catch diagnostic (block-scoped `ref`/`writePayloadKeys` hoisted).

## 2026-06-10 вҖ” [fix] CanvasRailLayout TRUE hero (100dvh) + desktop geometry activation
**Merge `812008fb`** (feat/canvasrail-hero-100dvh). **App-only вҖ” no rules/index.** Opus brief; Jacek GO (merge + prod deploy, no staging). Fixes the two post-0822c0c1 defects.

**D1 (chrome ate ~30% of height):** the page rendered the top-bar (back/title/subtitle/saveError) ABOVE and the hint BELOW the shell (local inline JSX, not shared `PageHeader`, `flexShrink:0`) вҶ’ field got ~70% of viewport height. **Fix:** `CanvasRailLayout` gained `header`/`hint` slots вҖ” in landscape they live INSIDE the left rail (rail = header В· content В· hint), nothing renders above/below the field/rail row; portrait keeps them full-bleed top/bottom (unchanged). `HitabilityPage` wrapper вҶ’ `height:100dvh`; landscape root drops vertical padding (safe-area insets only) so the field reaches full height.

**D2 (shell never activated on desktop):** `useLandscapeMode` = `device.isLandscape && !device.isDesktop` вҶ’ the `!isDesktop` gate forced portrait stack on вүҘ1024px. **Fix:** activation now decided by viewport GEOMETRY (`innerWidth > innerHeight`) inside `CanvasRailLayout` (any device/size; `isLandscape` prop kept as optional override); `HitabilityPage` no longer passes the device-gated value.

**Geometry caveat (documented, not a blocker):** a 1.6-aspect field + a side rail can't be literally 100dvh on every ratio вҖ” `field_height = (W вҲ’ railMin вҲ’ 8) / 1.6`, capped at H. ~99% on modern phones + wide desktops (the target devices), lower on small iPads/SE (the spec's sanctioned "scales down uniformly" edge case). Side rail per the spec's "all chrome in the left rail"; an overlay-rail (the only literal-100dvh-everywhere path) was NOT built вҖ” flagged for Jacek if ever wanted. Field letterboxes centered (balanced gaps) in the yield case.

**e2e #7 fail-first (emulator-verified):** new spec FAILS on the old layout (header above вҶ’ asymmetric letterbox gaps; desktop вҶ’ portrait stack `x<150`), PASSES on the fix. Adds a **1920Г—1080 desktop-landscape** assertion (in-test viewport switch, NOT a separate project вҖ” would 2Г— the whole suite) proving D2: field vertically centered (no chrome above/below), rail-left, hero fills >85% height, back nav INSIDE the rail, tap-after-resize counts. **Full emulator suite 22/22.** Build + lint (0 err) + precommit PASS.

**Owed: Jacek prod smoke** (double cold-launch to clear the old SW cache first): Hitability landscape on phone + desktop-wide вҖ” field fills the height, all chrome in the left rail, rotateвҶ’tap still hits the right target.

## 2026-06-09 вҖ” [fix] Schedule CSV import вҖ” team matching by name + full catalog + league-tag on confirm
**Merge `c33abbc5`** (fix/schedule-import-team-matching). **App-only вҖ” no rules/index.** Direct Jacek bug: the "Dopasuj" (match) dropdown was EMPTY вҖ” it only offered teams already carrying this league's division (`workspaceTeamsForDivision`), so a brand-new league (CDF) showed nothing + existing/global authorized profiles couldn't be substituted. Jacek follow-up: "compare by name; if one matches, ask whether to add that team a game in this league." **Fix:** (1) `teamsForResolver` (replaces `workspaceTeamsForDivision`) вҖ” the dropdown now offers ALL workspace/global teams (league+division matches sorted first, each labeled with its division for this league if any). (2) `findNameMatches` вҖ” when no league-division match exists, fall back to a NAME-only match: ONE hit вҶ’ the resolver row is **pre-selected** as a match + a note ("Znaleziono istniejД…cД… druЕјynДҷвҖҰ Dopasowanie doda jej grДҷ w lidze X (Div)"); many вҶ’ user picks from the dropdown. (3) On import, a matched team missing this league's division gets it added (`updateTeam` divisions merge вҖ” keeps other leagues) = "add a game in this league"; **best-effort** (try/caught, non-fatal вҖ” the scouted entry already records the division, so the import succeeds even if the global team-write is denied for a non-super user). Summary log: "oznaczone w lidze: N". Net: existing global teams substitute onto CSV teams (dedup) + become proper {league} teams (auto-match next import). Build + precommit PASS. **Owed: Jacek smoke** (re-import CDF #1 2026 вҶ’ name-matched teams pre-selected; dropdown lists all; post-import teams carry CDF/Premiere). **Note:** name matches are PRE-SELECTED (batch-confirm via Import), not a per-team yes/no вҖ” flagged to Jacek as a revertable UX call.

## 2026-06-09 вҖ” [fix] Schedule CSV import вҖ” flexible/optional dates + sequence ordering
**Merge `35e30e11`** (fix/schedule-import-flexible-dates). **App-only вҖ” no rules/index.** Direct Jacek bug: import date handling too strict ("powinna obsЕӮugiwaДҮ rГіЕјne formaty albo nawet jej brak; bez daty вҖ” sortuj po kolejnoЕӣci jeЕӣli jest kolumna #/index/lp"). **Fix:** (1) `parseScheduleDateTime` now multi-format + tolerant вҖ” `Thursday, 14th May`, ISO `2026-05-14`, `DD/MM[/YYYY]` with `. / -`, `DD/MM` (year from tournament), `May 14, 2026`, US `MM/DD` fallback; time from the time column or an embedded `HH:MM`. Returns null on missing/unparseable (no longer an error). (2) `ScheduleCSVImport` detects an optional sequence column (`#`,`index`,`lp`,`nr`,`no`,`kolejnoЕӣДҮ`,`order`,`poz`,вҖҰ); the import **no longer aborts** on a bad/missing date вҖ” undated rows order by the lp value (else running row order), stored as `gameNumber`. (3) `groupMatchesByStage` orders by `gameNumber` when a match has no usable date. (4) `addMatch` keeps an explicit `date: null` as undated (manual/OCR callers that OMIT date still default to today) вҶ’ undated matches show no date pill. **Verified:** 10/10 (9 date-format cases incl. no-dateвҶ’null, US MM/DD, year-from-string; undated sort by sequence = [1,2,3]) + build + precommit. **Owed: Jacek smoke** (3 cases: non-PBLeagues date format; no-date + #/lp column; no-date + no column вҶ’ row order).

## 2026-06-09 вҖ” [fix] Schedule CSV import вҖ” league-aware division resolution
**Merge `9585207f`** (fix/schedule-import-league-divisions). **App-only вҖ” no rules/index.** Direct Jacek bug: importing the CDF #1 2026 schedule errored "Nieznana dywizja w wierszu 2: Premiere" вҖ” the import resolved divisions ONLY through the hardcoded NXL-centric `SCHEDULE_DIVISION_ALIAS` and aborted on the first miss, so a new league (CDF) failed. Jacek's clarification: it must work for ALL leagues by checking the league's own division names, not per-league aliases. **Fix:** new `resolveScheduleDivision(raw, leagueDivisions)` вҖ” (a) the decorated-export alias map (NXL `Pro X-Ballв„ў` вҶ’ `PRO`, kept), then (b) match the CSV value against the SELECTED tournament's league `/leagues/{id}.divisions` by `name`/`id`, **case+diacritic-insensitive** (`PremiГЁre` вүЎ `Premiere`), returning the canonical configured name. `ScheduleCSVImport` pulls the league's divisions via `useAllLeagues`; the unknown-division error now lists the league's valid divisions. `normalizeScheduleDivision` kept as a back-compat shim. **Verified:** 7/7 resolver logic tests (CDF Premiere variants вҶ’ `Premiere`; NXL alias intact; race/garbage вҶ’ null) + build + precommit. Superseded one-off `fix/cdf-division-alias` (deleted, not merged). **Caveat:** resolution reads `useAllLeagues`; its constants fallback lacks brand-new leagues вҖ” relies on the in-session module cache / fetch (fast). **Owed: Jacek smoke** (re-import CDF #1 2026 вҶ’ Premiere rows resolve).

## 2026-06-09 вҖ” [fix] Admin leagues list refreshes after create/edit/(de)activate
**Merge `79f039e9`** (fix/league-list-refresh). **App-only вҖ” no rules/index.** Direct Jacek bug: "creating a new league isn't saved." **Diagnosed via admin-SDK read вҖ” the league WAS written** (`l_cdf` "Francais Paintball", 4 divisions, active, created 19:30Z); it just never appeared in the admin list. **Root cause = broken-feedback, not broken-logic:** `useAllLeagues` used a module-level `cachedLeagues` + a one-shot `getDocs` guarded by `if (cachedLeagues) return` вҶ’ **never refetched in-session**, and the mutations never invalidated it вҶ’ a fresh league stayed invisible until a full page reload (and a retry then threw "League l_cdf already exists"). **Confirmed NOT rules:** the leagues write rule is `isSuperAdmin()`, which includes `isBootstrapAdmin()` = email `jacek@epicsports.pl` вҶ’ Jacek's write always passes. **Fix:** a small module-level pub/sub вҖ” `fetchLeaguesIntoCache` (single-flight) notifies every mounted `useAllLeagues`; new exported `refreshLeagues()` forces a refetch, called after `createLeague`/`updateLeague` (LeagueFormModal) + `deactivate`/`reactivate` (AdminLeaguesPage). `ensureLeaguesFetched` shares the single-flight (no double fetch). Constants fallback + cache semantics unchanged; acting admin's session updates instantly (other clients still on next load вҖ” per-client cache). Build + precommit PASS. No e2e coverage for admin-leagues (rides on the build + Jacek smoke). **Note:** `l_cdf` left in place (Jacek to keep/delete).

## 2026-06-09 вҖ” [Hitability responsive Canvas/Tool archetype] (В§113) вҖ” first responsive-canvas pilot
**Merge `9f46c322`** (feat/hitability-responsive). **App-only вҖ” no rules/index.** First build of the responsive **Canvas/Tool archetype** + the reusable **maximize-on-rotate rail primitive** (`CanvasRailLayout`), via the new **faithful-mockup loop** (design gate = Jacek-approved HTML mockup grounded in the real screen; environment gate = real-phone preview smoke) вҖ” both passed before merge.

**The redesign:** Hitability was portrait-LOCKED (portrait phone вҶ’ `KioskRotatePrompt` "rotate to landscape"). Now responsive in BOTH orientations. **Landscape rule (corrected, recorded В§113):** the field/heatmap is the HERO and **fills 100% of height** (native aspect via CSS `aspect-ratio` drives width); the rail is **RESIDUAL** (`flex:1`, `min-width: railMin` 200/240/280) and yields the field only if it would otherwise drop below `railMin` вҖ” **NOT** a fixed-width rail with the field in the remainder (the first WIP had it backwards; corrected to the approved mockup). Portrait = field on top, rail stacked below. Mode switcher moved INTO the rail. Config gains a rail (connections + legend); Tracking = HitList; Summary = weighted heatmap + HitBreakdownList.

**В§81 alignment (not an override):** Hitability is canvas-primary, which В§81 itself reserves for rotate=maximize (the "no auto-promote" boundary is for scroll-dashboards). **Coordinate guardrail preserved across the reflow** (canvas self-measures via RO-on-wrapper + live-rect `relPos`; box-only reflow) вҶ’ **tap-after-rotate maps to the correct target.**

**Fail-first e2e (`hitability-responsive.spec.js`, #7) вҖ” verified on the emulator:** drives the REAL canvas across orientation. With the gate restored it **FAILS** (no stack in portrait вҖ” `hit-mode-track` not found); with the redesign it **PASSES** (7.4s) вҖ” portrait stack, landscape hero+residual rail, **tap-after-rotate counts 1вҶ’2**, reload survives. Seed: `trn-hit` training + a 1-target/1-position config; bridge `hitabilityHitCount`.

**Preview-deploy mechanism (new):** `VITE_PREVIEW=1` build вҶ’ `base '/pbscoutpro/preview/'` + **SW disabled** вҶ’ `gh-pages -d dist --dest preview --add` (kept the prod root intact; verified both root + `preview/` on gh-pages). Reviewer opened `вҖҰ/pbscoutpro/preview/#/training/<id>/hitability` on a real phone. The prod deploy (root, default clean) reclaimed `preview/` as designed (ephemeral).

В§27 PASS. Build + precommit PASS. **DESIGN_DECISIONS В§113** (responsive Canvas/Tool archetype + the rail primitive + the landscape hero-residual rule + В§81 alignment + preview-deploy). **Jacek real-phone smoke passed вҶ’ GO.** Reusable primitive ready for the Report+Canvas screens (PlayerStats/ScoutedTeam/LayoutAnalytics) next.

## 2026-06-09 вҖ” [Hitability counting bug RESOLVED + Podsumowanie redesign] (В§112) вҖ” consolidated
**Final HEAD `5ced8c26`.** App-only deploys, **no rules/index change** (rules were confirmed already-correct + deployed). Closes a multi-deploy counting bug + a Jacek-specified redesign.

**The counting bug (`9cb544d0`) вҖ” ROOT CAUSE found by instrumentation, not guessing.** After three "logic" fixes failed (e2e green, prod still 0 hits written), the diagnose-don't-blind-fix pass nailed it: an on-screen tap-chain readout showed the tap resolved the target (`targetsHit=1, dist 9/22`), wasn't a drag (`moved=0`), `commit=1` but **`wrote=0` with `ERR: null is not an object (evaluating 'n.indexOf')`** = the Firestore SDK on a **null path segment**. `trackTap` is `useCallback([t])`, so it captured `commitHit` from the **first render вҖ” before `useTrainings` resolved вҖ” when `layoutId` was null**; config *displayed* (its effect re-runs on `layoutId`) but the **write stayed pinned to `layoutId=null`** вҶ’ `collection(вҖҰ, 'layoutOverlays', null, 'hitabilityHits')` threw. **NOT rules** (admin-SDK role read: Jacek is super_admin+adminUid+coach; `firebase deploy --only firestore:rules` reported "already up to date"), **NOT coordinates**, **NOT tap-vs-drag. Fix:** `layoutIdRef`/`trainingIdRef` always hold the current value; the write helpers (`commitHit`/`attributeHit`/`delHit`) + `saveConfig` read the refs вҶ’ a stale memoised closure can never pin a null path. (Diagnostic deploys `d8b6d4bc`/`46e89e6d` carried a TEMP overlay, since removed.)

**Recording model (`b7215572`, earlier same window) = RECORD-THEN-ATTRIBUTE:** a target tap commits + persists a hit IMMEDIATELY (count == taps); 1-conn вҶ’ auto-attribute, multi вҶ’ `positionId=null` (no ask), 0-conn вҶ’ null + ask AFTER the count (pick edits the committed hit via `updateHitabilityHit` + forms the connection; dismiss keeps it). No position-1 default.

**Redesign + polish (`5ced8c26`):** (a) **desktop slow scale-up fixed** вҖ” the canvas observed itself with `width:auto`, feeding the draw buffer back into its layout size (Г—dpr growth per frame); now measure the wrapper + contain-fit + explicit px = deterministic. (b) **Podsumowanie now shows the heatmap** (reused canvas, weighted by this session). (c) **breakdown redesigned** вҖ” new shared `HitBreakdownList` (Podsumowanie + analytics): ranked by **obstacle** (most-hit first), each with a **position sub-breakdown** (sorted by count); replaces the flat pairs list; header "Trafienia wg celu". (d) all temp instrumentation stripped.

В§27 PASS. Build + precommit + **e2e 21/21** throughout (login:78/35 shared-state flake cluster, passed on re-run). **Jacek confirmed counting works ("dziaЕӮa!").** **В§112 Hitability fully done** (STAGE 1/2/3 + v2 + counting fix + summary redesign). **Owed: Jacek smoke** of the new Podsumowanie/analytics breakdown + desktop sizing.

## 2026-06-08 вҖ” [diag/hitability-tap-instrument] TEMP tap-chain instrumentation (В§112 diag вҖ” NOT a logic fix)
**Commit:** `d8b6d4bc` (merge). **App deploy. No rules/index.** Per the "diagnose-don't-blind-fix" instruction. Admin-SDK read: `hitabilityHits` = 0 across 3 deploys (config 6/12/8 unchanged) вҶ’ `commitHit` never fires вҶ’ break is upstream (tap not resolving a target) or stale bundle. Green e2e + broken prod = environment-specific. Adds a `DEBUG` on-screen readout to the Hitability module: build marker (`RTA-DBG1` вҖ” confirms bundle freshness), per-tap `up/moved/drag`, `targetsHit` + nearest-target dist vs radius, `rectW/sizeW`, `commit`, `wrote`, live `hits`. **One Jacek tap вҶ’ reports the three lines вҶ’ localizes the broken link.** **TO BE REVERTED** after diagnosis; then the real fix + a real-path e2e (STEP 2).

## 2026-06-08 вҖ” [fix/hitability-record-then-attribute] Tracking count == taps, attribution non-blocking (В§112)
**Commit:** `b7215572` (merge). **App deploy ONLY вҖ” no rules/index change.** GO'd Opus brief (authoritative Tracking spec).

**Locked principle вҖ” RECORD-THEN-ATTRIBUTE:** the hit count must NEVER be gated behind attribution. A target tap **commits + persists a hit IMMEDIATELY** (`commitHit` вҶ’ `hitabilityHits`; onSnapshot reflects +1 at once via latency compensation, survives reload); **count == taps, always**; no modal in the critical path. Attribution is a separate, non-blocking follow-up:
- **1 connection** вҶ’ committed attributed to that position (auto, silent).
- **multiple connections** вҶ’ committed `positionId = null` (target-level hit; counts toward total + Podsumowanie + analytics weight); **no ask**, **no `owners[0]` auto-pick**.
- **0 connections** вҶ’ committed `null` (counts NOW) вҶ’ **then** ask "Z ktГіrej pozycji?" **after** the count; pick вҶ’ `attributeHit` edits the committed hit (`updateHitabilityHit`) + forms the connection (next taps auto-attribute); **dismiss вҶ’ stays counted**. **No position-1 default** (removes the prior deploy's behavior).
- Delete unchanged. Null-source hits render "вҖ” вҶ’ Cel X" in the list.

New `dataService.updateHitabilityHit` (coach-write via the wildcard, no rule change). В§27 PASS. Build + precommit + **e2e 21/21** (login:78 flaked once вҶ’ passed on re-run, known shared-state flake, unrelated). **DESIGN_DECISIONS В§112.** **Owed: Jacek smoke** (the 3-case acceptance: 1-conn/multi/0-conn target Г—3 вҶ’ counter == taps, survives reload, 0-conn asks AFTER counting + dismiss keeps the hits).

## 2026-06-08 вҖ” [fix/hitability-tap-counts] Tap target = +1 immediately, no picker (В§112)
**Commit:** `c4dde8bd` (merge). **App deploy ONLY вҖ” no rules/index change.** Direct Jacek bug report ("po tapniДҷciu w cel trafienia dalej siДҷ nie zliczajД… вҖҰ kaЕјde tapniДҷcie to nowe trafienie celu").

**Root cause (admin-SDK prod read, not guessed):** layout `ranger1996/XtQQKhVIegdTylygsbVX` had config = **6 positions / 12 targets / 8 links** but **`hitabilityHits` = 0**. With links spread thin, almost every target tap had **multiple** candidate positions вҶ’ opened the "Z ktГіrej pozycji?" `ActionSheet`, and a hit only saved if the coach completed the modal (he didn't вҶ’ 0 hits). The picker was the friction.

**Fix:** `trackTap` records a hit **IMMEDIATELY on target tap, no picker** вҖ” `recordHit(tid, owners[0] || positions[0] || null)` (target's connected position if any, else position 1, else unattributed; auto-forms the connection when missing; link-create guarded on non-null pid). Each tap = a new hit on that target. Precise multi-position disambiguation (tap the connection LINE directly) is the **deferred density / Canvas-archetype UX**, not a per-tap modal.

В§27 PASS. Build + precommit + **e2e 21/21**. **DESIGN_DECISIONS В§112** (data-confirmed root cause). **Owed: Jacek smoke** (Tracking вҶ’ tap target repeatedly вҶ’ badge climbs + hit-list rows, no picker; analytics totals). Throwaway admin-read diag NOT committed (read-only).

## 2026-06-08 вҖ” [fix/hitability-tracking-count] Tracking counted nothing on unlinked targets (В§112)
**Commit:** `8d43ac22` (merge). **App deploy ONLY вҖ” no rules/index change.** Direct Jacek bug report ("counting does not work вҖ” I tap on target and player and nothing happens").

New `recordHit` also **auto-creates the (playerвҶ’target) pair** if missing, so the count lands in the badge + hit-list **and** the Podsumowanie/analytics (which key off `config.links`). Tracking now works without a pre-link step; pairs form on first hit. Coach-write only.

## 2026-06-08 вҖ” [feat/selflog-propagated-block] Propagated selfReport = block-while-propagated, honest state (В§110 a вҖ” В§110 CLOSED)
**Commit:** `9697b4db` (merge). **App deploy. No rules/index change.** GO'd Opus decision (closes the last В§110 sub-item).

A **propagated** selfReport (`propagatedAt != null`) is **not individually deletable**. Recompute (un-merge) was **rejected**: the bound slot is **mixed-source without per-entry provenance** вҖ” scouting via `MatchPage` writes the SAME flat `zoneShots`/`shots` arrays the propagator dedupe-appends to (`MatchPage` serves training too), and `shotsMeta[slot]` is last-writer only вҶ’ pure-self is undetectable per-slot; В§70 is sources-immutable (corrections via Stage 4 reassign, not subtraction). So **block вҖ” but with an HONEST state, not a dead/absent control** (the brief's explicit requirement):
- **`ActionSheet`** gains an additive **`disabled`** item (muted, non-pressable, wraps); items without the flag unchanged.
- **`TodaysLogsList`** вҖ” a propagated row still opens the В§7 вӢ®, to a disabled explanatory item **"Scalone w punkcie вҖ” nie moЕјna usunД…ДҮ tutaj. Korekta przez reassign (wkrГіtce)."** instead of delete. Unpropagated + unlinked-pending delete paths unchanged.
- i18n `ppt_delete_propagated_note` (PL+EN). **No recompute, no point mutation, no rule/index change.**

Propagated-correction proper = **Stage 4 reassign** (queued, В§70.11), not standalone delete. **В§110 fully CLOSED** (sticky + delete a/b). В§27 PASS (the dead-control anti-pattern is precisely what this removes). Build + precommit + **e2e 21/21**. **DESIGN_DECISIONS В§110.1.** **Owed: Jacek smoke** (linked self-log already merged into a point вҶ’ вӢ® вҶ’ shows the explanatory line, no delete).

## 2026-06-08 вҖ” [feat/selflog-delete-pending] Delete unlinked /pendingSelfReports/ entry (В§110 Part b)
**Commit:** `893fda94` (merge). **App deploy. No rules/index change.** GO'd Opus brief (completes one of two В§110 sub-items).

Completes В§110 sub-item **(b)**. An **unlinked** pending draft is never propagated (`slotRef`/`propagatedAt` always null; the drafts collection is excluded from collectionGroup until link-migration) вҶ’ **no point/rollup contribution** вҶ’ a bare `deleteDoc` is the whole cascade.
- New **`deletePendingSelfReport(id)`** (bare `deleteDoc` on `/pendingSelfReports/`, mirrors `deleteSelfReport`).
- `TodaysLogsList.canDelete` now lights the В§7 вӢ® on unlinked rows too: `!pending && id && (isLinked ? !propagatedAt : true)`; ConfirmModal handler branches `isLinked ? deleteSelfReport : deletePendingSelfReport`.
- **Rules unchanged** вҖ” `firestore.rules:371-373` already allows owner delete on `/pendingSelfReports/{sid}` (`resource.data.uid == request.auth.uid`).

**Part (a) вҖ” propagated-selfReport delete: RE-ESCALATED, NOT built (В§110.1).** The brief's *un-merge by recompute* is unsafe: the bound slot is **mixed-source without per-entry provenance** вҖ” scouting via `MatchPage` writes the SAME flat `zoneShots` (`:1567-1569`/`:1155`) + `shots` (`:1620-1621`/`:1153-1156`) slot arrays the propagator dedupe-appends to (`dataService.js:1827`/`:1844`), and `MatchPage` serves training too (`isTraining`); only a slot-level last-writer `shotsMeta`, no per-zone/per-shot tag. So recompute-from-remaining-self-sources would **erase the coach's tags** on a dedupe collision (the exact collision-erasure the Acceptance forbids). **Unblock = product answer from Jacek:** are training self-log slots guaranteed **pure-self** (coach never canvas-tags zones/shots per slot)? Yes вҶ’ build (a); mixed possible вҶ’ per-entry provenance (own brief) or block-while-propagated. No silent block+redirect.

В§27 PASS (reuses В§7 idiom verbatim; `ConfirmModal` guards). Build + precommit + **e2e 21/21**. **DESIGN_DECISIONS В§110.1.** **Owed: Jacek smoke** (unlinked PPT вҶ’ today's pending log вҶ’ вӢ® вҶ’ "UsuЕ„ punkt" вҶ’ confirm вҶ’ gone + list refreshes) **+ the Part-(a) workflow answer**.

## 2026-06-08 вҖ” [fix/catalog-swr-single-flight] Catalog stale-while-revalidate + single-flight (training "data disappears" fix)
**Commit:** `fffa8594` (merge). **App deploy. No rules/index change.** GO'd Opus brief off CC read-only discovery.

**Symptom (Jacek, prod):** training participants/lineups (uczestnicy/skЕӮady) **suddenly disappeared mid-use**, returning "po jakimЕӣ czasie" / after refresh. Intermittent.

**Root cause (discovery verdict, confirmed):** the **IDs** arrive via onSnapshot (fine) but the **people** resolve through the version-gated catalog (`usePlayers` вҶ’ `useGatedCatalog`). The old hook, on a `/meta/catalogVersion` mismatch, went straight to `await fetchDocs()` (3,242-doc `getDocs(/players)`) with `docs` held at `[]` for the whole refetch вҖ” the still-valid stale IDB payload was served **only in the error `catch`**. So `playersById = {}` throughout вҶ’ consumers' `(ids).map(pid => playersById[pid]).filter(Boolean)` (`TrainingScoutTab:77-81`, Kiosk, MatchPage, SquadEditor) **collapsed squads/attendees to empty**. The window opened on every `usePlayers` remount (tab-switch/nav) while the version was stale; **`cc76f9ad` amplified it** (bumps on ~8 routine mutations vs ~2) вҶ’ ordinary edits (own or background coach/CSV) flipped the version вҶ’ next remount = blank refetch. "Po jakimЕӣ czasie" = the multi-thousand-doc fetch latency.

**Fix (shared `useGatedCatalog` вҖ” all consumers at once):** **(1) Stale-while-revalidate** вҖ” on mismatch, serve the non-empty stale IDB payload **immediately** (`revalidating` flag) + refetch in the **background**, swap to fresh on land вҶ’ consumers **never blank**; cold start keeps `loading` (no silent-empty); poisoned-empty guard preserved. **(2) Single-flight** вҖ” refetches dedupe per `kind:version` (`_catalogInflight`) вҶ’ N stale-window mounts share ONE `getDocs`, one recache. **(3) cc76f9ad edit-propagation preserved** вҖ” bump still forces the refetch; edit visible the instant it lands, not "edit invisible up to 30d". `revalidating` threaded through `usePlayers`/`useTeams`/`useActiveTeams` (additive).

В§27 N/A (data-layer). Build + precommit + **e2e 21/21**. **PROJECT_GUIDELINES В§9 amended + DESIGN_DECISIONS В§111.** **Owed: Jacek repro-smoke** (edit a player / assign a team вҶ’ switch into scout tab / navigate within training вҶ’ names stay visible, no blank; hard-refresh PWA first). **Deferred (own brief):** cc76f9ad bumps the GLOBAL version on routine single-doc edits вҶ’ full 3,242-doc refetch per bump per client; SWR+single-flight *bounds* it (one refetch, no blank) but not its frequency вҖ” later scoped analysis on incremental propagation.

## 2026-06-07 вҖ” [fix/kiosk-lobby-viewport] KIOSK lobby viewport: decouple W/H floors + honest fallback (no В§35 HotSheet)
**Commit:** `aefbcb6c` (merge). **App deploy. No rules/index change.** Two GO'd Opus briefs (Part 1 + corrected Part 2).

**Symptom (Jacek):** the 5-tile lobby (after "PrzekaЕј graczom") didn't launch even on a laptop вҖ” `kioskViewport.js` rejected on `h < 768` (1366Г—768 laptop usable height ~640 after browser chrome) вҶ’ futile rotate prompt (impossible on a laptop).

- **Part 1 вҖ” decouple W/H.** The В§27 risk is **WIDTH-only** (the 5-tile grid is width-driven: `PlayerTile` fixed-height + fixed type, columns `1fr`; a short viewport scrolls, it does NOT shrink tiles). `MIN_WIDTH=1024` **unchanged**; `MIN_HEIGHT` **768 вҶ’ 600** (lobby content-min вүҲ header 56 + grid pad + one 200px tile row вүҲ 300px). Laptops + iPad-landscape now reach the lobby. **В§27 preserved, not traded.**
- **Part 2 вҖ” drop the invalid В§35 HotSheet fallback (CC STEP 0 catch).** `featureFlags.selfLog` is **off**; the HotSheet is a single-player own-phone MatchPage FAB (different device/user), NOT an in-overlay hand-around. Replaced with: **(2a) entry-gate** вҖ” `KioskPostSaveSummary` hides "PrzekaЕј graczom" when `canEverFitKioskLobby()` (longer **physical** screen edge < 1024 = phones) is false вҶ’ coach sees only "NastДҷpny punkt" (E6 phone path). **(2b) honest fallback** вҖ” `KioskLobbyOverlay` routes via `useKioskMode()`: `lobby` / `rotate` (portrait tablet that WOULD fit rotated) / `message` (`KioskRotatePrompt variant="needsDevice"`, "Potrzebny tablet lub laptop"). **No device ever sees a futile "rotate".**

i18n `kiosk_needs_device_title/msg` (PL+EN). В§27 PASS (width-driven tiles unchanged). **DESIGN_DECISIONS В§55.11.** Build + precommit + **e2e 21/21**. **Owed: Jacek smoke** on his laptop (training QuickLog вҶ’ pick winner вҶ’ "PrzekaЕј graczom" вҶ’ lobby launches; hard-refresh PWA first).

## 2026-06-07 вҖ” [feat/kiosk-scout-editor-trigger] OPEN KIOSK from the training scout editor + force-entry/rotate
**Commit:** `3549a957` (merge). **App deploy. No rules/index change.** Jacek report: in the training **full scout editor** (scout+coach often the same person), there's no KIOSK option after picking the point winner. **Root cause:** the KIOSK post-save (`kiosk.enterPostSave` вҶ’ `KioskPostSaveSummary`) was wired only into the **QuickLog** path (`TrainingScoutTab`), never MatchPage's `savePoint`.

- **MatchPage training** now shows **two CTAs** after the winner pick: **NEXT POINT** (save + back to review, existing flow) and **OPEN KIOSK** (save + `enterPostSave`). `savePoint` returns the saved point id; `scoutingSide` = active team's side (AвҶ’home / BвҶ’away, Jacek). Tournament keeps the single "Save point" (В§55-E4 KIOSK is training-only).
- **Force-entry + rotate prompt (Jacek: option available regardless of orientation, then rotate).** `enterPostSave(ctx, { force })` bypasses the E6 orientation no-op so the coach can ENTER from portrait; `KioskPostSaveSummary` + `KioskLobbyOverlay` render a new **`KioskRotatePrompt`** ("ObrГіДҮ urzД…dzenie poziomo") while `!isKioskCompatible`, swapping to the real landscape вүҘ1024 layout on rotate (`useKioskCompatible` re-evaluates on `orientationchange`). QuickLog passes no `force` вҶ’ unchanged (silent no-op on phone).

## 2026-06-07 вҖ” [fix/ppt-nowy-punkt-sticky] "Nowy punkt" stays in the current training
**Commit:** `213636bb` (merged in `792279e1`). **App deploy. Nav-state fix only.** Opus brief, Jacek GO. **Symptom (prod):** training "Nowy punkt" threw the player back to the training picker. **Root cause:** `setActiveTraining` was called only on explicit picker-pick (`handlePickTraining`), not on wizard auto-entry (single-live `:177` / direct `?trainingId=`) вҖ” so a player who auto-landed had no sticky, and `handleNewPoint` (`:216-226`) fell to the picker (`pick=1`) with >1 live training.

- **Fix:** `setActiveTraining(training.id)` on **`WizardHost` mount** (when the training resolves) вҶ’ "Nowy punkt" re-fires the wizard in **this** training (mirrors tournament's URL-persisted event). The **"ZmieЕ„ trening" pill** (`clearActiveTraining` вҶ’ `pick=1`) stays the **sole** picker path. Guarded on a resolved training (no stale/invalid-sticky write). Resolution order + picker unchanged. CC discovery confirmed NOT an architecture mismatch.

В§27 N/A (nav-state). Build + precommit + **e2e 21/21**. **Owed: Jacek smoke** (auto-pick вҶ’ log вҶ’ Nowy punkt вҶ’ same training; pill вҶ’ picker вҶ’ switch works). DESIGN_DECISIONS вҖ” folded into the В§48 PPT notes via this entry.

## 2026-06-07 вҖ” [feat/zone-attribution-path-intersection] Zone kill-credit via pathвҲ©polygon (replace W1 containment)
**Commit:** `8b60667e` (merge). **App deploy. No rules/index/Firestore change.** Opus brief (W1 revision), Jacek GO. - **`helpers.js`** вҖ” `segmentIntersectsPolygon(a,b,polygon)` (edge-crossing вҲӘ endpoint-inside) + canonical `zoneMembership(path, zones)`. The single geometric zone-membership rule (manual scout tags stay assertion-based). Geometry sanity-checked (crossing / endpoint-inside / miss / degenerate / parallel = 7/7).
- **`playerStats.js`** вҖ” `buildPlayerPointsFromMatch` now carries `opponentEliminationPositions` + `opponentSide`. Previously the elim position was unset вҶ’ `elimPos` fell back to the opponent's START position (degenerate path). Per-slot fallback to the player position when an elim position is null.
- **`generateInsights.js` Step 1.5** вҖ” `start = fieldCalibration[opponentSide==='home'?'homeBase':'awayBase']` (the eliminated player's side base); `path = [start, elimPos]`; credit slots whose tagged callout zone (`pt.zoneShots`/`zoneObstacleShots` вҶ’ `resolveZones`) the path crosses вҶ’ split 1/N. Ladder **precision (winner) вҶ’ path-zone (split) вҶ’ band (split)**, precedence intact (first match returns, no double-count). `fieldCalibration == null` guarded вҶ’ skip to band. **RAW per-side space only** (homeData/awayData + raw calibration + raw polygons) вҖ” never the mirrored heatmapPoints.

В§27 N/A (pure compute). Build + precommit + **e2e 21/21** (incl. #5 stats-kills, no precision/band regression). **DESIGN_DECISIONS В§30** corrected to path-intersection. **Owed: Jacek verify** вҖ” opponent baseвҶ’Dog, hit at Dog; base player tagged ALFA (between base and Dog) вҶ’ ALFA credits the player (containment gave 0). **OPEN follow-ups (Jacek's call):** (a) align **self-log** zone-shots onto pathвҲ©zone (today still centroid-precision via Step 1 вҖ” same on-path limitation; means changing the #3 STAGE-0 propagator); (b) **fieldSide-swap** edge вҖ” start maps home/awayвҶ’homeBase/awayBase per the brief; if a team is scouted on the opposite side, key start off the opponent's actual `fieldSide` instead.

## 2026-06-06 вҖ” [feat/zone-attribution-w1] Callout-zone shots as a 3rd kill-credit source
**Commit:** `0e71e2d9` (merge). **App deploy. No rules/index/Firestore change** (`zoneShots` already written/stored). Opus reuse-first brief (Workstream 1 of 2), Jacek GO. **Closes the gap:** scouting zone-tags (`pt.zoneShots`/`pt.zoneObstacleShots` = calloutZone ids, written by the QuickShotPanel callout pills) contributed **zero** to hit attribution вҖ” only precision (`pt.shots`) + band (`quickShots`/`obstacleShots`) were read.

- **`computePointKillCredits` gains Step 1.5 вҖ” callout-zone containment**, between precision and band. Per eliminated opponent with a known position: callout zones whose polygon (`pointInPolygon`, `resolveZones(field.layout)`) **contains** the elim position, credited to slots that tagged any such zone вҶ’ **split 1/N**, then `return`. **Specificity ladder:** precision (point, winner) вҶ’ callout-zone (polygon, split) вҶ’ band (lateral, split). **Precedence** вҶ’ no double-count.
- Self-log zone-shots already earn **precision** credit (В§109 propagator writes synthetic xy at the zone centroid), so Step 1.5 is specifically what makes **scouting** zone-tags (ids, no xy) count. **Graceful:** no layout/zones вҶ’ `resolveZones` `[]` вҶ’ no-op вҶ’ precision+band identical.
- Per-slot `calloutTags` set = `pt.zoneShots[s]` вҲӘ `pt.zoneObstacleShots[s]` (distinct from the BAND set вҖ” the `:1443` naming trap, now documented).

В§27 N/A (pure compute, no UI). ## 2026-06-06 вҖ” [feat/zone-shot-selflog-stage0] Zone-shot self-log вҖ” `{zoneId, kill}` schema + dual-read (STAGE 0/3)
**Commit:** `bb7aed97` (merge). **App deploy. No rules/index/Firestore-schema-migration** вҖ” additive dual-read, no data migration. Opus staged brief (zone-shot capture Pattern B), Jacek GO. **STAGE 0 = data layer only**; the capture drawer (STAGE 1) + heatmap render (STAGE 2) follow. - **`propagateSelfReportToPoint` dual-read** (`dataService.js`): a `zoneId` shot resolves synthetic XY from the **callout-zone polygon centroid** (`resolveZones` + new shared `polygonCentroid`) + carries the binary `kill`; a legacy `bunker` shot keeps the bunker-centre path **byte-for-byte**. `propagateMatchup` resolves + threads `layoutZones`.
- **`computePlayerStats` self-shots dual-read** (`playerStats.js`): `targetZoneId` вҶ’ zone centroid вҶ’ `getBunkerSide` вҶ’ break-shot side bucket; legacy `targetBunker` вҶ’ unchanged. `kill` tallied as `selfShotKills` (surfaced for STAGE-2 heatmap kill emphasis; 0 until capture ships).
- **`PlayerStatsPage` orphan-fold** (В§108) `selfShots` mapping now dual-reads `{zoneId,kill}` vs `{bunker,result}`.
- **`helpers.polygonCentroid`** вҖ” shared vertex-average centroid (matches the inline `HeatmapCanvas` luf-connector convention).
- **Verified safe across all 7 self-report shot consumers** вҖ” the two `bumpLayoutAggregate*` crowdsource writers guard on `targetBunker`/`s.bunker`, so zone-shots skip the bunker aggregate gracefully (crowdsource untouched, as intended). **No writer emits `zoneId` yet** (STAGE 1) вҶ’ **production byte-identical**.

В§27 N/A (data layer, zero UI diff). Build + precommit + **e2e 21/21** (incl. #1 concurrent-merge вҶ’ propagator, #2 log-point вҶ’ dual-read proven). **STAGE-1 orientation LOCKED (Jacek):** the drawer shows a **fixed right half** (`viewportSide="right"`) вҖ” callout zones are authored on the field's right side and it's always self-log, so no per-point/breakout orientation derivation (clears the STEP-0 escalation). **Next: STAGE 1** capture drawer (Pattern B) вҶ’ STAGE 2 heatmap render.

## 2026-06-06 вҖ” [feat/selflog-live-visibility-readside] Live self-log visibility on PlayerStatsPage (read-side)
**Commit:** `d3660fa6` (merge). **App deploy. No rules/index/Firestore-schema change** вҖ” pure read-side fold, no write/propagation-model touch. Opus brief, Jacek GO. Fixes: a linked player's self-logged training points (W5 вҖ” flat `/selfReports/`, written live by the PPT wizard) did **not** appear in their own PlayerStatsPage **breakout stats** until the training was closed / matchup merged (the В§70 propagator binds W5вҶ’W4 only on close). Samoocena (В§70.9) already showed them live; the gap was the breakout-stats surface + the scope auto-default.

- **STEP 1a вҖ” orphan-report fold (breakout stats).** After the scouted byMatchup walk, fold every **orphan** self-report for the training (`getSelfReportsForPlayer`, filtered `!propagatedAt && !reviewDismissedAt && breakout.bunker`) in as a **synthetic free-play player-point** `{playerSlot:0, outcome:null, teamData:{}, selfLog:{breakout,outcome,deathReason}, selfShots:[{targetBunker,result}]}`. `computePlayerStats`' **existing** self-log bridge (`:214-226` bunker/position, `:250-261` break-shot %, `:148` `outcome!=='alive'` survival) aggregates them **identically** to a coach-scouted point вҖ” no new stats path (В§27 Consistency). W5 outcome vocab (`alive|elim_break|elim_midgame|elim_endgame`) aligns exactly with the `!=='alive'` check вҖ” no remap.
- **STEP 1b вҖ” scope auto-default union.** Self-view default candidate set = trainings ATTENDED (`attendees[]`) **вҲӘ** trainings SELF-LOGGED in (`/selfReports/` trainingIds), latest by `training.date`. Self-logging never writes `attendees[]`, so the prior attendee-only default stranded self-loggers on global scope. Read-side union only.
- **Dedup invariant вҖ” `propagatedAt` is the single dedup key.** Orphan (`null`) folds here; the propagator stamps `propagatedAt` (non-null) **and** writes the W4 representation in the **same pass**, so a propagated report is counted via the byMatchup walk and **excluded** from the fold. **Exactly-once** across the close boundary, live or post-close, never doubled.
- **Option ii (write/propagation model) deliberately NOT taken** вҖ” binding W5вҶ’W4 at save time is a В§57 multi-source-observation architecture call, not a visibility bug. Recorded in В§108 for the backlog.

В§27 self-review: **zero JSX/visual diff** (data-layer only) вҖ” Color/Elevation/Typography/Cards/Nav all PASS-by-non-applicability; data flows through existing components. Anti-patterns ZERO. Build + precommit pass. **DESIGN_DECISIONS В§108** records the W5-orphan/W4-bound read rule + `propagatedAt` dedup key + option-ii-not-taken. **Owed: Jacek smoke** вҖ” self-log a point via the PPT wizard вҶ’ open own PlayerStatsPage вҶ’ lands on that training's scope, Samoocena **and** breakout bunker/survival/break-shot stats show it LIVE (before close); after closing the training, counts identical (no double).

## 2026-06-06 вҖ” [fix/catalog-version-bump-coverage] Catalog-version bump coverage вҖ” fix the stale-edit class
**Commit:** `e4dda651` (merge). **App deploy. No rules/index change** (uses the existing `/meta/catalogVersion` marker). Opus brief, Jacek GO. Fixes the class CC flagged after the team-color fix: catalog mutations that didn't bump the version left clients showing old data until the version-gated IndexedDB cache (30d TTL) expired вҖ” "edit invisible up to 30 days." **FIT-relevant** (a new team edits players/teams; edits must propagate).

- **STEP 0 audit** found 7 gap mutations (no bump): `updatePlayer`, `addPlayer`, `changePlayerTeam`, `addTeam`, `retireTeam`, `unretireTeam`, `setParentTeam`. Already-bumping: `updateTeam`, `mergePlayers`, `setPlayerHero`, `deletePlayerGlobal`. Coverage was partial + at the UI layer (admin forms + CSV bumped externally вҶ’ non-admin paths like PlayerEditModal/quick-add/team-assign were stale).
- **Fix:** added `{ bump = true }` opt to all 8 catalog mutations (canonical place вҶ’ every caller covered). **CSV passes `{ bump: false }`** to its per-row calls + keeps its single end-bump (avoids a 3000-row import doing 3000 version writes). Cascade `retireTeam`/`setParentTeam` internal writes pass `bump:false` вҶ’ one bump per retire. Removed the now-redundant admin-form bumps (`PlayerFormModal`, `TeamFormModal` + their imports).
- **Deliberate NO-bump:** `selfLinkPlayer`/self-unlink (writes only `linkedUid` вҖ” personal/routing; the linker's UI updates via `subscribeLinkedPlayer`, not the catalog cache) + `setWorkspaceLogo` (workspace doc, not the catalog).
- **Invariant documented** so future mutations don't reintroduce the gap: a comment at `bumpCatalogVersion` + a PROJECT_GUIDELINES В§9 anti-pattern.

В§27 N/A (dataService + CSV/admin write paths; no UI surface). Build + precommit pass. **Emulator e2e 21/21** (no regression from the signature changes вҖ” the opt is defaulted/non-breaking). **Owed: Jacek smoke** вҖ” edit a player name/number (non-admin path) on one device вҶ’ appears on another after reload, no 30-day wait.

## 2026-06-06 вҖ” [firestore:indexes] Drop 2 dead `shots` composite indexes
**`firebase deploy --only firestore:indexes --force`** (index-only вҖ” no rules, no code, no app deploy). Opus brief, Jacek GO. Removed two dead collectionGroup composite indexes on the hot `shots` collection (eliminates their write-amplification on every shot write):
- **`shots(playerId, tournamentId)`** (`6fd1ce76`) вҖ” superseded when Read-vol C Stage 2 (`73aba833`) moved `fetchSelfLogShotsForPlayer`'s 2nd server field `playerId вҶ’ workspaceSlug` (for tenant-isolation provability).
- **`shots(playerId, createdAt DESC)`** вҖ” superseded when the picker hooks migrated to the `/layoutAggregates` doc (`useLayoutShotHistory`) + `(playerLinkedUid)` carve-out (`usePlayerBreakoutHistory`).

**Zero live consumers вҖ” exhaustively verified** (STEP 0 + 0b): every `collectionGroup('shots')` site filters `(workspaceSlug, tournamentId)` or `(playerLinkedUid)`; **nothing filters `playerId` on `shots`** (the `where('playerId')` sites are on `/selfReports`, not shots; the `PLAYER_SELFLOG.md` `(playerId)` refs were doc-stale). Deploy reported "Deleting 2 indexes" + success; admin-SDK probe confirms both now throw `requires-index` (GONE) and `(workspaceSlug, tournamentId)` is intact. Remaining `shots` indexes: `(layoutId, breakout)` В· `(workspaceSlug, tournamentId)` В· `playerLinkedUid` single-field. Reversible (re-add + redeploy вҶ’ rebuild). `PLAYER_SELFLOG.md` stale index note fixed.

## 2026-06-05 вҖ” [feat/pat-stage3-merge-timeline] Point-as-Timeline Stage 3 вҖ” carry timeline[] through the two-side merge
**Commit:** `1fe4fe56` (merge). **App deploy. No rules change, no data change.** Opus brief (reframe). **Gate (Stage 2.5) confirmed shipped** вҖ” HeatmapCanvas/ScoutedTeamPage/generateInsights already render per-stage Break/Settle/Mid from `timeline[]`.

- **Reframe:** concurrent scouting = per-coach streams, each scout watches ONE side; `endMatchAndMerge` combines home-side (home-scout) + away-side (away-scout) into the canonical doc вҖ” a per-side **UNION, not consensus** (chess-model point-close combine was retired Apr 2026, so the combine site is end-match, not point-close). Discovery: the merge combined `homeData/awayData` per-side but **dropped `timeline[]`** вҶ’ each side's Settle/Mid keyframes lost on consolidation (recoverable from source drafts; no real 2-scout history вҶ’ no backfill).
- **Fix:** `mergeStreamTimelines(tlA, tlB)` вҖ” per-stage (settle/mid) union: `home = ka.home || kb.home`, `away = ka.away || kb.away` (mirrors `homeData = pA.homeData || pB.homeData`); annotations re-indexed loss-free. Wired into the canonical assembly (`timeline:` was missing). 3-vs-1 case (one scout 3 stages, other 1) carries each captured side, other null. Solo/legacy keep `timeline[]` canonical-in-place.
- **Held out of scope (brief):** index-pairing rebuild (deliberate offline-safe design), consensus/conflict-resolution (sides don't overlap), backfill.

## 2026-06-05 вҖ” [fix/b24-mojibake-import-guard] B24 player-name mojibake вҖ” import guard (a) + 16-doc --live repair (b)
**Commit:** `717be17a` (merge). **App deploy + admin-SDK `--live` data repair (16 docs).** Jacek GO'd a+b after the read-only discovery. **Origin:** double-encoded UTF-8 in *source* CSVs (`Г©` bytes C3 A9 read as Windows-1252 `ГғВ©`, re-encoded) вҖ” `CSVImport.jsx` read them faithfully. Vision ruled out (bunker names only); manual entry clean. **Scope:** 16 of 2,592 global catalog names, ALL `ranger1996`-owned (FIT/pbfit unaffected), all legacy imports (12Г— 2026-04-16 batch + 4 in May); names are referenced by ID from points (not denormalized) вҶ’ repairing `/players` fixes every surface.

- **(a) Import guard (code):** new `repairMojibake()` (`src/utils/mojibake.js`) вҖ” reverses the encoding via a FATAL `TextDecoder` latin1вҶ’utf8 round-trip, so a correctly-encoded name (whose latin1 bytes aren't valid UTF-8) is returned UNCHANGED. Wired into `CSVImport` for **player + nickname** (players match by `pbliId` вҶ’ repair never affects matching). **NOT** applied to `team` (matchTeam name-fallback + unrepaired team docs вҶ’ would risk a duplicate). Prevents new corrupt imports from persisting. Verified: all 16 repair; 42 clean diacritic names untouched.

## 2026-06-05 вҖ” [fix/layout-bunkername-rekey] Layout bunker-naming вҖ” re-key off positionName вҶ’ stable identity
**Commit:** `5c578ba6` (merge). **App deploy. No rules change. No global `/layouts` write (lazy overlay-only migration).** Fixes the reported "renaming a bunker changes the name on two obstacles" вҖ” per-workspace display-names were keyed by `positionName`, which collides when two distinct obstacles share a name ("NXL EUROPE #2 - UK" has two "Dykta" obstacles). Opus brief, decision (A) Jacek-locked.

- **`src/utils/bunkerNames.js` (new):** `stableKey = b.masterId || b.id`. Mirrors link via the explicit `masterId` field (NOT an id suffix вҖ” two variants exist in prod: `_mirror`/`_m`). Master+mirror collapse to one key (pair-rename preserved); two same-named obstacles get independent keys (bug fixed). `normalizeBunkerNames(bunkers, overlay)` lazily reconciles both legacy maps (id-keyed `bunkerNames` + positionName-keyed `bunkerNameOverrides`) вҶ’ stableKey form, preserving current names + dropping stale keys.
- **`useFirestore` merge:** `displayName` resolved by stableKey; normalized map exposed. All bunker-name consumers read the attached `displayName` (keying-agnostic) вҶ’ no consumer change.
- **`LayoutDetailPage`:** displayBunkers / rename read+write / persist re-keyed; persist writes the migrated map + retires legacy `bunkerNames` ({}). Persist-on-next-write = the migration.
- **Side benefit:** blank `positionName` no longer collides on `override['']` (fixes NXL Tampa latent issue).
- **Scope (A):** 4 legacy layouts (Prague/PLX/Tampa/sample) predate `masterId` вҶ’ keyed per-bunker-id; names preserved, mirror pair-rename doesn't propagate there (accepted вҖ” frozen; their repeats are all geometric reflection pairs, no genuine dup). Current+future (UK, Midwest Open) author via editor/VisionScan вҶ’ masterId stamped вҶ’ fully correct. (B) masterId backfill + (C) runtime geometric pairing OUT.

В§27 N/A (display-only re-key, identical render). Build + precommit pass. **Verified vs real UK prod data (shipped helper):** collision fixed, pair-rename preserved, current render unchanged, stale "Skar 1" dropped, idempotent. **e2e 21/21.** DESIGN_DECISIONS updated (В§b2a UPDATE). **Owed: Jacek** вҖ” base repair UK [0] "Dykta"вҶ’"Palma" (safe anytime; recoverable via legacy `bunkerNames["b_вҖҰix3m"]="Palma"`) + smoke: rename one "Dykta" вҶ’ other unchanged; master rename still moves its mirror.

## 2026-06-04 вҖ” [fix/scouttab-hooks-310] HOTFIX: React #310 crash on cold launch
**Commit:** `93ece048` (merge). **App deploy. No rules change.** Prod-down hotfix.

Cold-launch crash (`Minified React error #310` вҖ” "rendered more hooks than during the previous render"). Cause: `ScoutTabContent` had `addDivOptions` + `visibleAvailable` `useMemo`s **below** the `if (!tournament) return <Loading/>` early return (introduced Stage C). On cold launch `tournament` is null first вҶ’ early-return (fewer hooks); once it resolves вҶ’ those useMemos run вҶ’ hook-count mismatch вҶ’ crash. Warm loads (tournament cached) didn't trip it вҶ’ slipped earlier smokes.

Fix: moved both useMemos **above** the early return (deps already computed there; `tournament?.league` no-ops to undefined while loading). No behavior change. Audited CoachTab + MainPage вҖ” no other hook-after-early-return. **Owed: Jacek smoke** вҖ” cold launch (hard reload / fresh tab) into Scout tab no longer crashes.

## 2026-06-03 вҖ” [refactor/global-first-crud] Global-first CRUD for players/teams (unblocks admin-parity)
**Commit:** `661938db` (merge). **App deploy. No rules change.** DESIGN_DECISIONS В§105. Prerequisite for admin-parity Stage 1.

`updatePlayer`/`changePlayerTeam`/`updateTeam`/`addPlayer(create)` converted from workspace-twin-first (`updateDoc(bp())`) to **global-first `setDoc(merge)` + conditional twin mirror** вҖ” the pattern `retireTeam`/`unretireTeam` already use.
- **Root:** `updateDoc(bp())` threw cross-workspace (`bp()` throws with no active workspace; `updateDoc` throws on a missing twin вҖ” the super-admin case). Now the canonical `/players|/teams` write never throws on a missing twin; twin mirrored only when an active workspace is set (no wrong-workspace write; create-new ID minted from the global collection).
- New helpers `activeWsSlug()` + `mirrorTwin(coll,id,patch)`. `setPlayerHero` fixed transitively. `addPlayer` reuse path unchanged (already global-only).
- **Scope:** only global-catalog writes (players/teams). The 13 other `updateDoc(bp())` writes (tournaments/matches/points/layouts/tactics/trainings/selfReports/breakoutVariants) stay workspace-scoped вҖ” no global twin, single-workspace by design.
- **Dot-notation audit:** all patches flat/nested literals, zero dotted keys (each already ran through `setDoc(merge)` as its 2nd write pre-refactor). **Behavior parity** with an active workspace: identical end state (twin `setDoc(merge)` self-heals instead of throwing). Twin read path retired 2026-05-27.
- В§105 note: super-admin cross-workspace edit leaves a harmless stray twin in the editor's workspace вҖ” vanishes when Phase 2.x.d removes twin writes (no guard, accepted).

Build clean; precommit all-pass; В§27 N/A (no UI). **Owed: Jacek smoke** вҖ” workspace player/team edits (add/remove to team, HERO, edit profile, change team, leagues/divisions/extID, add new player) all still persist. **Next:** admin-parity Stage 1 Steps 2вҖ“3 (entry-wiring + bonus picker вҶ’ kit).

## 2026-06-03 вҖ” [feat/coach-3way-axis-stage2] Shot-model unification Stage 2 вҖ” coach 3-way axis (Break/Settle/Mid)
**Commit:** `5aa49c1e` (merge). **App deploy. No rules change.** DESIGN_DECISIONS В§102. Retires the 2-way Breakout/Post-breakout MODE.

Coach heatmap MODE is now **Break / Settle / Mid** (the old "Stage 2.5"):
- **Part 1 вҖ” data + aggregator:** coach mapper carries per-keyframe `zoneShots`/`quickShots` + `eliminationPositions`; `computeCalloutZoneTargets` `{break,obstacle}` вҶ’ **`{break,settle,mid}`** (Settle = Stage-1 compat `settle ?? kf#0.obstacle*` so OLD points still populate Settle; `obstacle` alias kept transitional).
- **Part 2 вҖ” canvas:** `HeatmapCanvas` `phase` accepts `break|settle|mid` (back-compat `breakoutвҶ’break`, `postBreakoutвҶ’settle`); `stageView` resolves per-stage positions/elim/runners/assignments/zone-tags from kf#0 or the timeline keyframe; luf per-stage. **Bump + precision-shot layers hide ONLY in the new `settle`/`mid` stages** (`showBreakLayers`) вҖ” legacy match-review/training (`postBreakout`) keep them (regression caught + fixed).
- **Part 3 вҖ” MODE 2вҶ’3-way:** surface-fill segmented bar Break/Settle/Mid; **Mid greyed** via `hasMid` (Break/Settle always on); `hmPhase` default `'break'`; `calloutZoneWeights` per-stage.
- **Part 4 вҖ” retire 2-way:** callout text sub-tables вҶ’ Break/Settle/Mid; post-breakout framing removed (Stage-1 forward-compat retained for Settle).

Composes with the Replay pill (`inertWhileReplaying`); the 3 static stages align 1:1 with the replay sequence. Build clean; precommit all-pass; В§27 PASS (extended existing surface-fill bar, no new component, no decorative amber, вүҘ44px). **Scoping:** Settle/Mid show positions + zones + luf + per-stage callout tables; precision-shot cones + bump are Break-only (kf#0, not carried per stage). **Owed: Jacek smoke** вҖ” team with Settle/Mid вҶ’ each stage shows its positions+zones+elims; Mid greyed when absent; old points show obstacleвҶ’Settle; match-review heatmap still shows shots/bump; Replay still overrides. **Next:** Stage 3 (legacy cleanup: `obstacle*` writes, i18n `callout_*`, TacticPage phase, PlayerStatsPage card labels).

## 2026-06-03 вҖ” [fix/dup-players-pbliid-guard] Duplicate players Part 1 (PREVENT) вҖ” match-or-create on pbliId
**Commit:** `d490f2a8` (merge). **App deploy. No rules change. No historical data touched (prevent-only).**

Duplicate players were real dup `/players` docs sharing a `pbliId` (create-instead-of-match). `addPlayer` (`dataService.js:219`) now, before `addDoc`: if `data.pbliId` is set AND `findPlayerByPbliId` finds an existing doc вҶ’ **reuse it** (join the requested team via global `setDoc(merge)` if needed) and return its ref; no second doc. No pbliId вҶ’ create as before; no name-match (pbliId = sole safe key). Also fixes the **intra-import race** (two CSV rows sharing one pbliId both falling to create) вҖ” lookup reads after each create's global dual-write.

**Audit:** all 5 create callers (CSVImport `:390`, PlayersPage `:60`, ScoutedTeamPage `:1845`, TeamDetailPage `:75`, admin PlayerFormModal `:109`) route through `addPlayer` вҶ’ all guarded; no direct `addDoc(collection(db,'players'))` bypass; onboarding/kiosk/self-report don't create player docs. **Closes the "PBLeagues matching relax" create-instead-of-link item.** Build clean; precommit all-pass; В§27 N/A.

**Part 2 (CLEANUP) sized вҖ” global admin read 2026-06-03 (read-only):** 3242 players (3092 with pbliId / 150 without), 2442 distinct pbliIds вҶ’ **550 colliding pbliIds = ~650 extra mergeable docs**, **78 groups with вүҘ3 docs**, **153 teams touched** (systemic, not Dynasty-only), **42 groups already partially aliased** (a prior merge вҶ’ pick the aliased doc as canonical, don't blind-merge). Part 2 = enumerated GO'd `mergePlayers` absorb (extra id вҶ’ `aliasIds[]`, re-point rosters/assignments, delete absorbed), `--dry` then `--live`; **never auto-delete.** Owed: Opus Part 2 brief.

## 2026-06-03 вҖ” [fix/stale-chunk-self-heal] self-healing stale-chunk reload (post-deploy cache)
**Commit:** `6206b4ee` (merge). **App deploy. No rules change.**

After a deploy, clients holding a cached `index.html` 404 on rotated chunk hashes (`vendor-react-*.js`) вҶ’ "Importing a module script failed" вҶ’ degraded render (random loading, `?`-names). Now self-heals: reload once to fetch the fresh bundle, loop-guarded.
- `utils/staleChunkReload.js` вҖ” `reloadOnceForStaleChunk()` with a 20s `sessionStorage` loop guard (reload again within 20s вҮ’ broken deploy вҮ’ don't reload, surface it); info-level Sentry signal (`captureMessage('stale-chunk self-heal reload','info')`, not error вҶ’ no error-count inflation); `STALE_CHUNK_RE`/`isStaleChunkError`.
- `main.jsx` вҖ” window `vite:preloadError` listener (primary; `preventDefault` so it never reaches the ErrorBoundary/Sentry as an error) + delayed `clearStaleChunkGuard` (~30s, past the window; not on bare mount, to avoid an auto-loading broken route chunk looping).
- `App.jsx` вҖ” ErrorBoundary is `Sentry.withErrorBoundary` (no custom `componentDidCatch`) вҶ’ stale-chunk check wired via its **`onError`** option (fallback path for import errors that reach React render).

**Deviations flagged:** componentDidCatch вҶ’ `onError` (Sentry boundary shape); guard-clear delayed ~30s, not immediate-on-mount (loop-safety). В§27 N/A (non-visual). **Owed: Jacek smoke** вҖ” after the NEXT deploy, a stale client should briefly reload once and land on the fresh bundle (no `?`-degradation); a genuinely broken deploy still shows the crash report (guard).

## 2026-06-03 вҖ” [feat/shot-model-unify-stage1] Shot-model unification Stage 1 вҖ” scout capture + reader forward-compat
**Commit:** `ba239a38` (merge). **App deploy. No rules change. No `--live` migration.** DESIGN_DECISIONS В§101.

Retires the break/obstacle (on-break / at-obstacle) shot phase вҖ” a redundant proto-timeline now that Break/Settle/Mid exists. **`obstacle вүЎ Settle`; precision unchanged; forward-compat read (legacy `kf#0.obstacle*` untouched + still read); stage-native field naming.**

- **A вҖ” decision:** DESIGN_DECISIONS В§101.
- **B вҖ” scout capture:** removed the QuickShotPanel break/obstacle (`shotPhase`) segmented toggle for the scout. Direction/zone capture now routes to the **active capture stage's** `quickShots`/`zoneShots` via the existing `captureStage`/draft indirection (BreakвҶ’kf#0, Settle/MidвҶ’`timeline.*`) вҖ” post-break shots logged by advancing to the Settle stage (StageSwitcher = context). `obstacle*` no longer written. **QuickShotPanel is now dual-mode** вҖ” `TacticPage` keeps its legacy Break/At-obstacle toggle (a tactic has no timeline; retirement = Stage 3). Precision (`ShotDrawer`вҶ’`draft.shots`) untouched.
- **C вҖ” reader forward-compat:** the coach post-break source resolves `timeline.settle.{quickShots,zoneShots}` (when a settle keyframe exists) `??` `kf#0.{obstacleShots,zoneObstacleShots}`. Injected at the coach mapper (`mapOnePointForTeam` вҶ’ feeds `computeCalloutZoneTargets` / `calloutZoneWeights` / HeatmapCanvas luf) and in `playerStats` (via `buildPlayerPointsFromMatch` `obstacleShotsSrc`). 2-way coach MODE (Breakout/Post-breakout) stays вҖ” reads compat вҖ” until Stage 2.

**Invariants:** shots only вҖ” bunker identity (`positionName`, `breakoutVariants`, self-log matching) untouched; break-only points byte-identical; no `--live`. **Owed: Jacek smoke** вҖ” Break shot logs in Break stage вҶ’ advance to Settle вҶ’ log post-break shot вҶ’ coach heatmap callout zones + player obstacle card show it; old points still render legacy obstacle data; TacticPage toggle still works. **Next:** Stage 2 (coach 3-way axis = old "2.5") вҶ’ Stage 3 (legacy cleanup: `obstacle*` writes, i18n `callout_*`, TacticPage phase, PlayerStatsPage card labels).

## 2026-06-03 вҖ” [fix/b3-roster-repair-hang] B3 roster repair stuck on "RepairingвҖҰ" forever
**Commit:** `8076f3a6` (merge). **App deploy. No rules change.** Repro + fix-direction from Jacek (the "ADMIN В· B3 ROSTER REPAIR" banner on the coach screen).

The admin "Repair scouted rosters" button stuck on "RepairingвҖҰ" indefinitely (no result box/toast). Root cause: `repairScoutedRostersForTournament` re-read the **entire global `/players` collection (~3.2k docs)** + teams fresh on every click вҖ” an uncached heavy one-shot get that stalled on slow mobile / near the Spark daily read cap, so the promise never settled.

- **Reuse cached catalog:** the fn takes a `preloaded` arg; `CoachTabContent` passes `usePlayers()` (the gated/cached global catalog) вҶ’ no 3.2k re-read. teams/scouted/matches/points (smaller, workspace) still read.
- **Guaranteed recovery:** the handler races the call against a 45s timeout вҶ’ the button can never stick; on timeout the existing red error box + toast surface. Banner kept (Jacek's call); repair logic/identity unchanged.

The "always visible" banner is **by design** (role-gated `isSuperAdmin && scouted.length>0`, `CoachTabContent.jsx:246`), not a bug. Build clean; precommit all-pass; В§27 N/A (reuses existing error UI). **Owed: Jacek smoke** вҖ” click Repair вҶ’ completes with green "ScannedвҖҰ updatedвҖҰ unchangedвҖҰ" within seconds, or a clear timeout error (no permanent "RepairingвҖҰ"). **Follow-up if it still times out:** single-pass the `collectAssignedPids` points walk (read each point once, not per-side) and/or surface a quota message.

## 2026-06-03 вҖ” [b1 + b2] workspace bunker-name isolation: guard global editor + per-workspace names everywhere
**Commit:** `1d4da04a` (merges of `fix/bunker-name-override-b1-guard` + `feat/bunker-name-override-b2`). **App deploy. No rules change.** From the layout-isolation + re-key discoveries. DESIGN_DECISIONS В§100.

Closes the "renaming a bunker in the admin panel changed it globally" report. Two parts:

- **b1 вҖ” guard/relabel the two editors.** `BunkerEditorPage` is the SHARED GLOBAL base editor: relabeled "Global base вҖ” names & types" + caution "вҡ  changes affect every workspace"; its layout-menu entry re-gated **super-admin only** (was isAdmin вҶ’ workspace admins hit the locked screen and mistook it for the per-team path). Workspace renaming stays on the layout page's "Names" config mode (overlay), banner clarified "per-team, visible only in your workspace". Removes the super-admin confound.
- **b2 вҖ” per-workspace names everywhere (name-keyed display override, NO re-key/migration).** Overlay holds name-keyed `bunkerNameOverrides { [basePositionName]: workspaceName }` (migrated on read from legacy id-keyed `bunkerNames`). `useLayouts` merge attaches an additive `displayName` per bunker (`override[positionName] ?? positionName`) + exposes the map. Display consumers resolve it: canvas (`drawBunkers`, HeatmapCanvas labels), PPT (`BunkerPickerGrid`), self-log (`ShotCell`/`BreakoutBtn`/`BreakoutCollapsed`; HotSheet delegates display to these). **INVARIANT:** `positionName` is never overwritten вҖ” every matcher / persisted doc (`breakout`/`targetBunker`) / `breakoutVariants` key / dedupe stays canonical; LayoutDetailPage strips `displayName` before the super-admin geometry save so no workspace name leaks to base. Name-keying also **fixes the master/mirror rename gap** (both share one name вҶ’ one override). Re-key/id-identity shelved as a future option (only buys base-rename/true-duplicate robustness).

Build clean; precommit all-pass; В§27 PASS (no new components/colors; English labels). **Owed: Jacek prod smoke** вҖ” rename a bunker per-team on the layout page вҶ’ that name shows on coach heatmap + scouting canvas + PPT picker + self-log, while the global base editor (super-admin) still shows the base name; historical breakout/shot matching unaffected; super-admin geometry edits don't leak workspace names to base.

## 2026-06-03 вҖ” [fix/subscribelistsafe-sweep] complete the subscribeListSafe migration (13 list listeners)
**Commit:** `d40c47aa` (merge). **App deploy. No rules change.** Follow-up to the bunker-editor P0 (`223ab2d4`), which surfaced that the `4f4c7765` cache-flap migration was incomplete.

Wrapped **all 13** remaining raw list `onSnapshot` listeners in `dataService.js` through `subscribeListSafe`: `subscribeEventsIndex`, `subscribeTournaments`, `subscribeNotes`, `subscribePoints`, `subscribeLayouts`, `subscribeLayoutOverlays`, `subscribeLayoutTactics`, `subscribeTactics`, `subscribeTrainings`, `subscribeMatchups`, `subscribeTrainingPoints`, `subscribeLayoutInsights`, `subscribeBreakoutVariants`.

- **Why:** each carried the same latent "transient empty-`fromCache` snapshot blanks already-shown data" bug class fixed for scouted/matches/baseLayouts. Now closed entirely вҖ” no raw list listeners remain (verified: only the helper itself + single-doc `subscribeLinkedPlayer`, correctly excluded).
- **Empty-safe:** `subscribeListSafe` suppresses ONLY an empty snapshot that is `fromCache` AND after data already delivered; first emission + server-confirmed empties (`fromCache:false`) still propagate, so legitimately-empty lists (`subscribePoints`/`subscribeTrainingPoints` on a new match/training) clear correctly. Inline notes added on those two.
- **Bonus:** every wrapped listener now also gets the `onErrorвҶ’Sentry` capture the helper provides (previously swallowed).

Build clean; precommit all-pass; В§27 N/A (data-layer only). **Owed: light Jacek smoke** вҖ” lists still load/refresh normally across tabs (events, tournaments, notes, points, layouts/overlays/tactics, trainings/matchups/training-points, layout-insights, breakout-variants); no flap on cache-cold tab switches.

## 2026-06-03 вҖ” [fix/bunker-editor-hittest-and-save-blank] global bunker editor: SAVE-blank (P0) + hit-test
**Commit:** `223ab2d4` (merge of save-blank fix + hit-test fix). **App deploy. No rules change.** From the diagnose-first report (HEAD `de85a5c9`).

Two prod bugs in the super-admin global bunker editor (`BunkerEditorPage`).

- **Bug 2 (P0) вҖ” SAVE blanked the whole editor.** `subscribeBaseLayouts` (`dataService.js`) was a **raw `onSnapshot`**, missed in the `4f4c7765` P1 cache-flap migration. A save nudged the persistent cache вҶ’ transient empty `fromCache` snapshot вҶ’ `useBaseLayouts` set `bases=[]` вҶ’ `BunkerEditorPage`'s `if (!layout) return null` blanked the editor. **No Firestore data loss** вҖ” Jacek confirmed the applied names show on re-entry (view-wipe). Fix: wrap in `subscribeListSafe` (canonical one-liner, in-class with `4f4c7765`; suppresses empty-`fromCache` after first delivery, server-confirmed empty still clears). Canonical-only (no BunkerEditorPage hardening вҖ” Jacek's call).
- **Bug 1 вҖ” precise tap grabbed the adjacent bunker.** `touchHandler.js` bunker `handleDown` returned on the **first** bunker within 30px in array order вҶ’ dense clusters opened a neighbor's editor + blocked naming all. Fix: **nearest-within-radius** anchor grab (scan all, pick closest). Label/pill drag unchanged.

Build clean; precommit all-pass; В§27 N/A (non-visual logic fixes). **Owed: Jacek prod smoke (hard-reload)** вҖ” Save no longer blanks the editor; dense-cluster taps open the correct bunker; new bunkers placeable in tight gaps.

**`[ESCALATE вҖ” separate follow-up]` incomplete `4f4c7765` migration:** ~13 other raw, unwrapped list `onSnapshot` listeners remain in `dataService.js` (`subscribeEventsIndex`, `subscribeTournaments`, `subscribeNotes`, `subscribePoints`, `subscribeLayouts`, `subscribeLayoutOverlays`, `subscribeLayoutTactics`, `subscribeTactics`, `subscribeTrainings`, `subscribeMatchups`, `subscribeTrainingPoints`, `subscribeLayoutInsights`, `subscribeBreakoutVariants`). Same one-line wrap, but `subscribePoints`/`subscribeTrainingPoints` legitimately go empty вҶ’ per-listener sanity check needed, not a blind find-replace. Deferred to its own brief (not expanded into this branch per the brief's >2 rule).

## 2026-06-03 вҖ” [feat/stage6-lite-replay] 3-step replay animation (Point as Timeline Stage 6-lite)
**Commit:** `89acccd7` (merge of `db8ed092` + `3a260ad3` + `c13830cf`). **App deploy. No rules change.** Charter `docs/POINT_AS_TIMELINE.md`; brief archived `docs/archive/cc-briefs/CC_BRIEF_STAGE6_LITE_REPLAY.md`.

A short looping, toggleable preview of player movement across the stage keyframes вҖ” **Break (keyframe #0) вҶ’ Settle вҶ’ Mid (`point.timeline[]`)** вҖ” on both the coach heatmap (`ScoutedTeamPage`) and the match-summary heatmap (`MatchPage` review). OFF by default; markers tween by `slotId`; eliminated players freeze + fade progressively.

- **6L-0 `db8ed092` вҖ” `timeline[]` through both mappers (SHARED with Stage 2.5):** `mapOnePointForTeam` (ScoutedTeamPage) + `getHeatmapPoints` (MatchPage) stopped stripping `timeline[]` (full doc already in memory вҖ” **no new fetch**). Each Settle/Mid keyframe's matching side reduced + mirrored to keyframe #0's canonical space (slotId-aligned). **This is the Stage 2.5 coach-report data-access sub-task вҖ” done once.** Single-side review path keeps no `side` field (preserves existing A/green static coloring).
- **6L-1+6L-2 `3a260ad3` вҖ” replay layer + progressive elimination in `HeatmapCanvas`:** new `replay` prop. `buildReplayModel` (forward-filled per-phase positions + `outAt`) built once (`useMemo`); RAF loop plays BreakвҶ’SettleвҶ’Mid (600ms holds / ~1s smoothstep tweens). **Markers-only during play** (aggregate Positions/Shots/Bump/Zone layers skipped вҶ’ ~markers/frame); **OFF schedules no RAF (zero idle cost).** Elimination: alive at Break вҶ’ per-keyframe freeze+fade(0.4) вҶ’ kf#0 end-state on the final frame. Edge policies: absent-later = stays put; appear-later = fade in; вүҘ2 keyframes required. Per-player isolation dims non-selected.
- **6L-3 `c13830cf` вҖ” toggles (same component, two surfaces):** coach "в–¶ Replay" pill in the Layers row (reuses pill idiom; amber only while active); while playing the Mode bar + Positions/Shots/Plan/Notatki pills go inert, **Isolate stays live**, no state mutated вҶ’ restores on OFF. Match-summary global "в–¶ Replay" pill sibling **above** the per-team capsule row. Both disabled until вүҘ1 Settle/Mid keyframe exists.

Build clean (HeatmapCanvas +167 lines); precommit all-pass; В§27 PASS (amber = active-only; elimination fade functional not decorative). **`[CONFIRM JACEK]` 6L-2** elimination semantics implemented as the brief's decided reading. **Process note:** no staging env вҖ” **Owed: Jacek prod smoke (hard-reload for new chunks)** on a point that has Settle/Mid keyframes: replay loops BreakвҶ’SettleвҶ’Mid В· markers tween В· eliminated freeze+fade progressively В· shots/zones hidden during play + restored on stop В· pill disabled when no stage data В· zero idle when off.

## 2026-06-02 вҖ” [feat/callout-zone-choropleth] callout-zone frequency choropleth ramp (OSTRZAЕҒ 3)
**Commit:** `60d2263f` (merge of `8116148f`). **App deploy. No rules change.** В§OSTRZAЕҒ deferred item (3).

The callout-zone heatmap fill is graduated by how much each zone is shot/held in the active phase.

- **Discovery:** the weight-scaled fill **already existed since B1** (`0.14 + 0.4В·count/maxW`) вҖ” the brief's "flat/binary" premise was stale. This finalizes (3) as a tuning pass.
- **`HeatmapCanvas`:** fill opacity = `lerp(0.12, 0.42, freqNorm)`, `freqNorm = count / maxCountInPhase` (count-normalised within the active phase via `calloutZoneWeights`; per-selected-player under isolation). Hue stays the zone's own colour (identity); only intensity varies. Lowered max (0.42 vs prior 0.54) so the fill stays readable UNDER the positions / cones / luf-connector layers now drawn on top.
- **No centred count label:** luf connectors terminate at the zone centroid вҶ’ a label there would collide; count/% lives in the text table (per the brief's "skip if it competes").

Phase-driven (`hmPhase`); zero-shot zones still hidden (hide-empty filter holds); no regression to positions/shots/connectors. Device-agnostic (opacity ramp, zoom-independent). Build clean; precommit all-pass; В§27 PASS. **Single dial if contrast off on prod:** the ramp `(0.12, 0.42)`. **В§OSTRZAЕҒ deferred now: only the mode-GROUP redesign (1c)** вҖ” Opus finalizing.
